# **Welcome to Jusst 4 You: Your Premium Surprise Planner**

At Jusst 4 You, we pride ourselves on being your go-to destination for creating unforgettable moments through surprise planning. Our team of dedicated experts is here to turn your ordinary occasions into extraordinary celebrations. With meticulous attention to detail and a passion for spreading joy, we offer a range of services designed to make every moment truly special.

## **Birthday Surprise Planning: Making Every Year Remarkable**

Birthdays are more than just milestones – they’re opportunities to create cherished memories with loved ones. Our **[birthday surprise planning service](https://jusst4you.com/?s=birthday+surprise&post_type=product)** is all about adding that extra spark of excitement to your special day. From themed parties that transport you to another world to intimate gatherings filled with laughter and joy, our team ensures that every aspect is tailored to perfection. With Jusst 4 You by your side, your birthday celebration will be an affair to remember for years to come.

## **Anniversary Surprise Packages: Celebrating Your Love Story**

Anniversaries are a time to reflect on your journey together and celebrate the love that binds you. Our **[anniversary surprise packages](https://jusst4you.com/?s=Anniversary&post_type=product)** are crafted with romance and sentimentality in mind. Whether you’re marking one year or fifty, our team will create a romantic ambiance that captures the essence of your relationship. From personalized decor to thoughtful touches that speak to your unique bond, we’ll ensure that your anniversary is a day to cherish forever.

## **Proposal Planning: Crafting the Perfect Moment**

Ready to take the next step in your relationship? Let us help you plan the perfect proposal that will sweep your partner off their feet. Our **[proposal planning service](https://jusst4you.com/product-category/proposal/)** is all about creating a magical moment that reflects your love story. Whether it’s a sunset beach proposal or a cozy indoor setting, we’ll handle every detail with care and precision. With Jusst 4 You, your proposal will be an unforgettable declaration of love.

## **Romantic Dates: Igniting the Flames of Passion**

Every couple deserves a romantic escape or **[romantic movie date](https://jusst4you.com/product-category/movie-date/)** from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. Our romantic date planning service is designed to rekindle the flames of passion and create lasting memories with your significant other. Whether it’s a candlelit dinner under the stars or a cozy evening by the fireplace, we’ll set the scene for an unforgettable experience that will deepen your connection and leave you longing for more.

## **Candlelight Dinners: A Culinary Journey of Love**

Indulge in a culinary journey of love with our **[candlelight dinner experiences](https://jusst4you.com/product-category/romantic-dining/)**. Whether you’re celebrating a special occasion or simply treating your loved one to a night of indulgence, our candlelight dinners are sure to delight the senses and stir the soul. From gourmet cuisine to exquisite decor, every detail is thoughtfully curated to ensure an evening of romance and enchantment.

## Couple Activities in India

At Jusst 4 You, we’re not just in the business of surprises; we’re in the business of crafting once-in-a-lifetime experiences for couples across India. Whether it’s a birthday bash, an anniversary celebration, or a bachelorette party extravaganza, we specialize in providing tailor-made [**couple activities surprises**](https://jusst4you.com/product-category/couple-activities/) that will leave you speechless. Picture this: a romantic date set against the backdrop of a stunning sunset, a marriage proposal that takes your breath away, or a **[first-night decoration](https://jusst4you.com/product/romantic-night-decor/)** that sets the mood for a lifetime of love. With our commitment to creativity and attention to detail, we ensure that each moment is as unique as your love story. Let Jusst 4 You be your partner in creating unforgettable memories that will last a lifetime.

## **Cabana Surprise Decorations: Luxurious Celebrations**

Escape to a world of luxury and romance with our **[cabana surprise decorations](https://jusst4you.com/?s=Cabana+decoration+&post_type=product)**. Perfect for intimate celebrations or romantic getaways, our cabana setups exude elegance and charm. From plush furnishings to soft lighting and delicate accents, our team will transform your space into a haven of love and tranquility. With Jusst 4 You, your special moments are elevated to new heights of luxury and bliss.

# The Den Cabana

📍 Mayur Vihar Phase 1

Rated **4.00** out of 5

1 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Private white cabana setup with lakeview

- Red and white themed décor

- Rose petal pathway entrance

- Six-course North Indian meal for a couple

- Ambient jazz music for a romantic vibe

Read more

The Den Cabana offers the ultimate romantic dining experience, combining elegance and tranquility in a serene lakeside setting. The white cabana, adorned with red and white themed décor, creates a perfect backdrop for your evening. As you enter, you'll be greeted by a rose petal pathway leading to the cabana, where you can unwind and enjoy the romantic ambiance.

The atmosphere is further enhanced with jazz music, setting the mood for an unforgettable experience. If needed, mist fans are available to ensure a comfortable atmosphere throughout the evening, no matter the weather.

For the culinary experience, indulge in a six-course North Indian meal that has been pre-decided to suit your tastes, with options for both veg and non-veg dishes. Whether you're celebrating an anniversary, a special occasion, or simply enjoying each other's company, The Den Cabana is designed to provide the perfect balance of luxury, comfort, and romance.

Surrounded by the peaceful lakeside view and with personalized services to cater to your every need, this is an evening you'll cherish forever.

Read more

- iSuitable for couples (2 guests)
- iAdvance reservation required
- iSetup duration typically 2–3 hours
- iMeal preferences to be shared in advance
- iWeather conditions may affect outdoor experience
- iIdeal for anniversaries, date nights, and proposals

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Luxury Cabana Candlelight at Taj

📍 Taj Vivanta, Dwarka

Rated **5.00** out of 5

4 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Private cabana candlelight dining setup in the garden area

- 2 welcome mocktails (non-alcoholic) for the couple

- 4-course North Indian meal (veg & non-veg options available) including:




  - Starters

  - Main course

  -  Breads / Rice

  -  Desserts
- Dedicated private butler service

- Comfort arrangements such as mist fan or heater depending on weather

- Private couple seating arrangement

Read more

Indulge in a luxurious romantic evening with the Luxury Cabana Candlelight Experience at Taj Hotel. Set in the serene garden area, this private cabana dining experience offers an elegant setting designed especially for couples. The beautifully decorated cabana creates an intimate atmosphere with soft lighting and refined décor. As you arrive, refreshing mocktails are served before you enjoy a delicious four-course North Indian meal prepared with rich flavors. A dedicated private butler ensures attentive service throughout the evening, while comfort features like mist fans or heaters keep the ambience pleasant. This exclusive experience promises a memorable and romantic celebration.

Read more

- iThis experience is designed for two guests (couple setup only).
- iThe cabana dining setup is arranged in the garden area of the hotel.
- iThe package includes a 4-course North Indian meal for the couple.
- i2 non-alcoholic welcome mocktails are served upon arrival.
- iA private butler will assist throughout the dining experience.
- iThe experience duration is approximately 2.5 to 3 hours.
- iAdvance reservation is required to arrange the cabana setup and dining.

Read more

She Said Yes

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# She Said Yes

📍 Mayur vhar phase 2

Rated **5.00** out of 5

1 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Romantic proposal setup with a “She Said Yes” theme

- “MARRY ME” LED letters centerpiece

- 20-30 glass candles for a magical candlelit ambience

- Rose petals pathway for the grand entrance

- Heart-shaped rose arrangement on the ground

- Fairy lights and heart-shaped balloons for décor

- Personalized video screening to showcase your love story

- Confetti explosives for the proposal celebration moment

- Bottle of fruit champagne for a celebratory toast

- 1-pound truffle cake

- 3-course dinner for the couple (customizable cuisine)

- Dedicated private butler service

- Background romantic music

- Private and exclusive proposal setup

Read more

Celebrate one of life’s most unforgettable moments with this grand “She Said Yes” themed proposal experience. The setting features glowing “MARRY ME” LED letters, a romantic rose petal pathway, heart-shaped rose arrangements, and the warm glow of 120 glass candles. Fairy lights and balloons enhance the dreamy ambience while a personalized video screening shares your love story. Enjoy a delightful 3-course dinner, cake, fruit champagne, and private butler service in a completely exclusive setup.

Read more

- iAdvance booking is required to arrange the complete proposal experience.
- iThe duration of the experience is approximately 2.5 to 3 hours.
- iThe video for screening must be shared in advance for setup.
- iDécor elements may vary slightly depending on availability.
- iCuisine for the 3-course dinner can be customized based on available options.
- iAdditional décor enhancements or special arrangements can be requested at an extra cost.

Date on the Wings

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Date on the Wings

📍 Rohini, New Delhi

Rated **5.00** out of 5

4 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Unique dining setup on top of an aircraft wing
- Beautifully decorated table arrangement

- 6-course vegetarian North Indian dinner

- Fresh flower bouquet

- ½ kg chocolate cake

Read more

Elevate your love—both literally and emotionally—with our unique and unforgettable Date on the Wings experience. Designed for couples looking to do something extraordinary, this magical evening is set on the wing of an actual aircraft, where the sky meets romance in a truly one-of-a-kind setting.

The experience begins as you arrive at the beautifully pre-arranged location and are welcomed to your exclusive table, elegantly decorated and set on the sturdy, open wing of a grounded aircraft. As the sun sets and the stars begin to sparkle above, the atmosphere turns nothing short of enchanting.

To begin your date, a fresh flower bouquet is offered as a warm gesture of celebration. Then, sit back and enjoy a 6-course North Indian vegetarian meal, crafted with love and designed to indulge your taste buds. Each dish is served with care, making sure your evening flows seamlessly with flavour and finesse.

A delectable ½ kg chocolate cake follows, perfect for celebrating a special occasion like a birthday, anniversary, or even a surprise proposal. The setting is surreal, romantic, and completely private—giving you and your partner the space to connect deeply.

Whether you’re surprising your partner or celebrating something meaningful, Date on the Wings is an experience that promises to soar above all others, leaving you with cherished memories that will last a lifetime.

Read more

- iThis experience is designed for a couple (2 guests).
- iThe dining setup is arranged on top of an aircraft wing for a unique aviation-themed experience.
- iThe package includes a 6-course vegetarian North Indian dinner.
- iA flower bouquet and ½ kg chocolate cake are included for celebration.
- iAdvance booking is required to arrange the special setup.
- iThe experience may be subject to weather and venue availability due to the outdoor setting.

# Luxury Oriental Dining at Dwarka

📍 Sector 21, Dwarka

Rated **4.00** out of 5

1 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Romantic dining setup with table décor

- Rose petals and candlelight decoration

- Non-alcoholic welcome drinks for the couple

- 4-course oriental meal (vegetarian and non-vegetarian options)

- Ambient background music

Read more

Indulge in a luxurious oriental dining experience crafted for a romantic escape. Set in a serene ambiance with elegant table décor, rose petals, and candlelight, this experience offers the perfect setting for couples. Enjoy refreshing welcome drinks and a flavorful 4-course oriental meal, complemented by soothing music, making it an unforgettable celebration of love.

Read more

- iExperience duration is approximately 2 hours
- iLocation: Dwarka
- iSetup is designed for couples
- iMeal preferences to be shared in advance
- iAlcohol is not included
- iAdvance booking is mandatory
- iSuitable for anniversaries, date nights, and special occasions

# Desi Flavors

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Indulge in the rich and aromatic world of **Desi Flavors**, where you and your partner can savor an exquisite 3-course North Indian and Mughlai cuisine. Set in a beautifully decorated setting with candles and rose petals, this dining experience offers a perfect blend of flavors, ambiance, and elegance. Enjoy welcome drinks, exceptional service, and a cozy atmosphere that will make your evening unforgettable.

Read more

Step into the world of authentic Indian cuisine with our **Desi Flavors Dining Experience** at Udyog Vihar, Gurgaon. From the moment you arrive, you and your partner will be treated to a warm and welcoming ambiance, complete with a beautifully decorated table adorned with candles and rose petals, setting the perfect mood for a romantic and intimate meal.

Begin your culinary journey with refreshing welcome drinks, specially crafted to complement the rich flavors of North Indian and Mughlai cuisine. Our expertly curated 3-course menu offers a delightful selection of traditional dishes, allowing you to indulge in the rich, aromatic spices and flavors that Indian cuisine is known for. Whether you prefer succulent kebabs, creamy curries, or aromatic biryanis, our menu has something to satisfy every palate.

The soothing ambiance, combined with the gentle glow of candlelight, creates an intimate setting perfect for romantic dinners, anniversaries, or special celebrations. Our attentive staff ensures that your experience is seamless, while the cozy and elegant decor adds to the charm of your evening.

Please note that this experience is designed for a couple, but additional guests can be accommodated at an extra cost. Convenient washroom and parking facilities are available for your comfort. Food takeaway is not permitted to maintain the quality of the dining experience.

Before booking, please contact us to confirm availability, as our exclusive setup is in high demand. The images provided are for representational purposes, and while we strive to maintain the highest quality, slight variations may occur.

Experience the true essence of Indian hospitality and flavors with **Desi Flavors**, where every bite tells a story of rich tradition and exquisite taste.

# Date from Roots

Rated **4.50** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Experience an enchanting **date night rooted in elegance** with “Date From Roots.” Delight in a cozy setting adorned with **candles and rose petals**, while savoring a delicious **3-course North Indian and Mughlai meal**. With **welcome drinks**, and mist fans or heaters for your comfort, this date setup is designed to make your evening memorable.

Read more

Celebrate love in its most elegant form with **Date From Roots** – a romantic experience carefully curated to bring warmth, taste, and ambiance together. Whether it's your anniversary, a surprise date, or just a day to cherish togetherness, this offering promises an intimate and memorable evening.

As you arrive, you're welcomed with **refreshing drinks**, setting the tone for a relaxing evening. The table setup speaks romance – beautifully decorated with **glowing candles and scattered rose petals**, creating the perfect visual delight. The serene setting allows you to unwind and focus solely on each other.

The highlight of the experience is the **lavish 3-course North Indian and Mughlai meal**, crafted to delight your taste buds with rich flavors, authentic spices, and heartwarming aromas. Whether you prefer vegetarian or non-vegetarian dishes, the menu has been designed to offer the best of both worlds.

To ensure your comfort throughout, the venue is equipped with **mist fans during warm weather** and **heaters during chilly evenings**, making it a perfect year-round experience.

With everything thoughtfully arranged – from food to ambiance – **Date From Roots** lets you create lasting memories with the one you love, wrapped in warmth, good food, and elegant surroundings.

metadata.og:description: Experience an enchanting date night rooted in elegance with “Date From Roots.” Delight in a cozy setting adorned with candles and rose petals, while savoring a delicious 3-course North Indian and Mughlai meal. With welcome drinks, and mist fans or heaters for your comfort, this date setup is designed to make your evening memorable.

# The Grand Cabana Tent by the Lakeside

📍 Mayur Vhar Phase 1

Rated **5.00** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Grand cabana tent setup by the lakeside

- Romantic décor with rose petals, fairy lights, and lanterns

- Premium décor arrangement

- Cozy seating with mattresses and pillows

- Premium fur sheet for added comfort

- Chef-curated 3-course meal for the couple

- Dedicated private butler service

- Soft background music for ambience

Read more

Escape into a romantic lakeside setting with The Grand Cabana Tent, where elegance blends beautifully with nature. The luxurious cabana is adorned with rose petals, fairy lights, lanterns, and premium décor to create a dreamy ambience. Relax on a cozy setup featuring comfortable mattresses, soft pillows, and a premium fur sheet while enjoying a delightful 3-course meal. With attentive private butler service and soothing background music, this experience promises an intimate and unforgettable evening.

Read more

- iAdvance booking is required to reserve the cabana experience.
- iThe setup is outdoors and may be subject to weather conditions.
- iDécor and setup elements may vary slightly depending on availability.
- iThe 3-course meal menu is curated by the venue and may vary.
- iAdditional services such as cake, photography, or customized décor can be arranged at an extra cost.

# Private Rooftop Delight in South Delhi

Rated **5.00** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Escape into a world of romance with our **Private Cabana Canopy Setup on Terrace**. Featuring cozy seating, rose petals, candles, fairy lights, and a delicious 3-course meal — all in a beautifully lit private terrace setting. Complete with background music and a private butler for a truly unforgettable evening.

Read more

Looking to create a magical evening your partner will never forget? Our **Private Cabana Canopy Experience on Terrace** is the ultimate romantic surprise — thoughtfully designed for love, intimacy, and unforgettable memories.

Begin your evening with a **warm welcome drink** on arrival as you’re led to a beautifully decorated **private terrace**, set up exclusively for you and your partner. A **cozy cabana canopy**, dressed in soft fabrics and ambient lights, welcomes you into a world of comfort and charm.

Sink into **mattresses and plush pillows** arranged inside the cabana — perfect for relaxing, unwinding, and enjoying each other’s company. The entire setup is enhanced with **rose petals, glass candles, fairy lights**, and **lanterns** that cast a soft, romantic glow around your space.

To add to the romance, there’s a carefully decorated **rose petal pathway** leading to your table, creating a red carpet moment as your partner enters. The **dinner table setup** is elegantly arranged for a fine-dining feel under the stars, combining taste and aesthetics.

The evening continues with a **3-course candlelight dinner**, specially curated for two. Relish **2 starters, 2 main course dishes, and 2 desserts**, all served hot and fresh by your **dedicated private butler**. Everything is handled with care so you can focus solely on your partner and the moment.

Set the mood further with **background music**, either from our playlist or something personal to your story. From slow romantic tunes to your favorite love song, we’ve got it covered.

Whether you’re planning a **proposal**, celebrating your **anniversary**, or want to **surprise your fiancé on her birthday**, this setup offers everything you need for a perfect night under the sky.

Why guests love it:

- Total privacy on a decorated terrace
- Comfortable and cozy cabana lounge setup
- Candlelight dinner experience with luxury service
- Romantic pathway and table styling
- Ideal for romantic celebrations and surprises

Let your love shine in the glow of lanterns and candlelight. Book your **Private Cabana Canopy** now for a memory you’ll cherish forever.

**NOTE:**

- Alcohol to be purchased separately
- Any additional requirements can be catered to if the notice is given in advance

![santas-annual-checklist-to-tune-up-the-sleigh](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/j4u-blog-new-1.png)

As Christmas is arriving around the corner, everyone is getting set in the holiday mood. But with the work hustle, we all might not be able to enjoy the true quiver of Christmas as we did as kids. Wouldn’t it be nice to religiously believe in Santa and his gifts all over again? Well, Santa might not be real but your love is, and just4you is right here at your service, bringing you a perfect surprise Christmas checklist to be the very own Santa for your loved ones.

## 1\. [Candlelight date under the tree](https://jusst4you.com/product/candlelight-date-under-the-tree/)

[![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Candlelight-date-under-the-tree-Jusst4you-1024x616.jpg)](https://jusst4you.com/product/candlelight-date-under-the-tree/)

We obviously had to go first with the classic romantic candlelight date which you can never go wrong with. But What’s better than a candlelight dinner? A Candlelight Dinner Under The Tree is covered with fairy lights that hang above your heads brightening your blushy faces, fading everything else in the background. Sounds like a Fairytale, doesn’t it?

## 2\. [Deliver yourself](https://jusst4you.com/product/deliver-yourself/)

[![Deliver yourself - Jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Deliver-yourself-Jusst4you-1024x616.jpg)](https://jusst4you.com/product/deliver-yourself/)

This one’s for all the long-distance couples out there who have only been seeing each other through those screens. We have a perfect surprise gift this Christmas for your partner that’ll make them want to jump right into your arms.

If you have not taken the hint yet, let us give you a minor gist of what’s going to happen! We are going to help you wrap yourself in a huge beautiful gift package that your partner will never be able to guess the contents of.

## 3\. Christmas decor at your desired place

![Christmas decor - Jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Christmas-decor-Jusst4you-1024x616.jpg)

If your partner is someone who enjoys reminiscing in the aesthetic vibes, Christmas is the perfect day for you to surprise them with a beautiful setup all to themselves. Sometimes home dates are much more valuable than the fancy ones, so why not get into that love zone at your own house!

## 4\. [Violinist at your doorstep](https://jusst4you.com/product/violinist-at-doorstep/)

[![Violinist - Jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Violinist-Jusst4you-1024x616.jpg)](https://jusst4you.com/product/violinist-at-doorstep/)

Christmas is that one occasion where we showcase our love for each other more than ever. And isn’t music the best way to express your love? How happy will you be to find a violinist at your door, playing and singing just for you! The best way to reside inside someone’s heart is definitely music, especially when it is sung in that melodious voice for you!

## 5\. [Movie delight](https://jusst4you.com/product/movie-screening-under-the-stars/)

[![Movie delight - Jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/12/Movie-delight-Jusst4you-1024x616.jpg)](https://jusst4you.com/product/movie-screening-under-the-stars/)

We are well versed about the fact that you might not be able to get a leave from your work just to organise something special. But hey! Sometimes it’s just the small gestures like helping your partner with the dishes after dinner; folding those clothes even when you don’t know how to!

So how about a date organised for you at night time! A decor for you and your partner, watching that romantic movie together; which you both love along with your favorite munchies! Isn’t that the most comfortable date ever?

![top-5-stay-active-in-winters-ideas](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/j4u-blog-new-14-2.png)

Winter is a chilling season, and we want you to chill all along the season! Well, for a few of you winter means staying at home inside a quilt sipping your favorite adraq tea, and watching Netflix or working maybe. While for some, it’s an opportunity to go out enjoy the sun, keep the body warm and challenge that dropping adrenaline. If it’s the latter category that you fall in, this blog, my friends, is for you!

![stay active in winters](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/j4u-blog-new-14.png)

## **1\. Private Yacht Candlelight**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/2.png)

Fancy, eh? Well yeah, no regular options will be served in this blog. Just like a Karan Johar movie, you and your partner will be the main lead showcasing all those Bollywood vibes that you have dreamt of, since your childhood. Play the tune you wanna dance on and live the once-in-a-lifetime moment. Address yourselves with the most delicious food without worrying about those extra calories!

Know more about it [here](https://jusst4you.com/product/private-yacht-candlelight/)

## 2\. Couple Photo Shoot

## ![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/3.png)

Mobile phone cameras can’t beat a DSLR irrespective of the megapixels. Similarly, no matter how good you are at taking pictures of your bae, you can’t take a great picture of both of you just by yourself. We present you the couple photoshoot package that includes photography at 4 different locations by our professional. It’s time for you to make and save memories at the same time J

Know more about it [here](https://jusst4you.com/product/couple-photo-shoot/)

## 3\. Long Drive Date

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/4.png)

Been dreaming of a long drive with your partner in a luxury car? We’ve got it sorted for you. Audi, Mercedes, BMW and more range of high-class cars, can give you the kind of experience you have been wanting forever. Choose from our world-class collection and drive in style with your go-to person. Book early to get the car of your choice and make those unforgettable memories for life!

Know more about it [here](https://jusst4you.com/product/long-drive-date/)

## 4\. Helicopter Joy Ride

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/11/5.png)

Enough with the ground and water, it’s time to go high (Not that high). Seeing drone shots in movies or YouTube is fascinating but living that is completely different and mesmerizing. 30 minute ride watching the city from 1000 ft. above the ground makes it worth trying. Take your loved ones to experience a breathtaking view of the city.

Know more about it [here](https://jusst4you.com/product/helicopter-joy-ride/)

![7-surprises-to-make-your-partner-awestruck-this-festive-season](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-featured-2.png)

The festive season is about gifts and hence, gifts will be expected! But then, when gifts are the norm, what would you do to make your loved one feel special? The Answer is simple- Gift them a never thought Surprise!

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-featured.png)So, we brought in 7 amazing ideas to help ease out the pressure you have been putting on your brain cells!

So, without wasting any time- here we go

## **Drink and Be Merry!**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you.png)We kept this first for a reason and it is that OH (or alcohol) is the solution for everything in life! So, with your partners having 99 tensions in their life, let booze not be the one!

Check out on [https://jusst4you.com/product/booze-bouquet/](https://jusst4you.com/product/booze-bouquet/)

## **Bowl Your Heart Out!**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you-2.png)The good old English sitcoms and movies and one thing that has always made for an amazing date is a “bowling session”. When you are no less fancy then why not try a bowling round or two?

Check out on [https://jusst4you.com/product/go-bowling/](https://jusst4you.com/product/go-bowling/)

## **Get that royal ride**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you2.png)Limousines are literally the highest symbol of elitism that makes one stare in amazement all the while- a lot of it also because the car is literally never-ending! Well, this festive season, make your partner feel special by taking them on a limo ride complete with a chauffeur!

Sounds like a plan?

Check out on [https://jusst4you.com/product/limousine/](https://jusst4you.com/product/limousine/)

## **Get Cozy Elite Style**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you-3.png)Candlelight dinners are good, candlelight dinners by the pool are better but what is the most surreal of the experience is a Candlelight dinner on a private yacht! Just imagine the feel of it- that regal elitist feel of you two!!

Check out on [https://jusst4you.com/product/private-yacht-candlelight/](https://jusst4you.com/product/private-yacht-candlelight/)

## **Tell Her You Care**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you-4.png)One thing about our wives and girlfriends is that they care so much about us that they forget to take care of themselves. Thus, this festive season remind them that you care for her and she needs to make herself a priority too with this amazing hamper!

Check out on [https://desorpresa.com/product/selfcare-hamper-for-her/](https://desorpresa.com/product/selfcare-hamper-for-her/)

## **Grand Gestures anyone?**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you-5.png)All of us have made fun of Bollywood movies and how suddenly everyone comes together and start dancing to a song in the perfect manner! Well, we can make your and your’s life into such a Bollywood sing-a-song with an amazing flash mob!

Check out on [https://jusst4you.com/product/flash-mob/](https://jusst4you.com/product/flash-mob/)

## **Netflix and here is the Chill**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/7-Surprises-to-Make-your-partner-awestruck-this-Festive-Season-jusst4you-6.png)We all love Netflix, we all love chilling but what is any kind of chilling without the snacks. So, while you and your privacy loving partner netflix and chill, here is something to binge eat on!

Check out on [https://desorpresa.com/product/netflix-and-chill-hamper/](https://desorpresa.com/product/netflix-and-chill-hamper/)

Now peeps- while we listed out a few options for you, you always know that there are just so many more and that you can always find them with us, even better

![but-i-told-you-i-wanted-that-karvachauth-special](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/j4u-blog-new-5-2.png)

Karvachauth is a special day for couples in love. Over time, this tradition has extended beyond the married ones to the unmarried or engaged ones too. Now, we understand that given how busy you always are, you may not always have time to plan something grand for you.

![Karvachauth special - jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/j4u-blog-new-5.png)

Luckily though, we have these grand bits covered for you.

So, this Karvachauth- fret not for we have your back!

## Go Yachting, Go Cruising

Because seriously pools are so passe and Karvachauth is special. So, if you really want to make a mark this time, go yachting and enjoy private time just like the rich and elites do.

[Check the details here!](https://jusst4you.com/product/private-yacht-candlelight/)

## ![Go Yachting, Go Cruising - jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/j4u-blog-new-1.png)The Tree and the Etchings

Remember those old times where handing around trees was the ultimate expression of love, so much that even Bollywood was obsessed with the same. Some of the “deeply in love” people even carved their names on it. Well, while carving is not on the table, an equally elaborate expression of love is!

How you may ask!

[Check the details here](https://jusst4you.com/product/lakeside-under-the-tree/)

## ![The Tree and the Etchings - jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/j4u-blog-new-2.png)The “You-Two” Time

Enjoy a cosy evening, just with each other, and no outside interactions and interruptions whatsoever, in the beautifully decorated cabana setup at the Hyatt.

[Check the details here](https://jusst4you.com/product/indoor-private-cabana-at-hyatt/)

## ![The “You-Two” Time - jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/j4u-blog-new-3.png)El Classico

Nopes-not the match between Real Madrid and Barcelona but the evergreen dinner date for the two of you. On the side of a pool, enjoy this awesome candlelight dinner and make your evening an evening to remember. Simply because you see, some things never get old!

[Check the details here](https://jusst4you.com/product/poolside-cabana-candlelight-in-cp/)

## ![El Classico - jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/10/j4u-blog-new-4.png)For Things that Last Forever!

We could tell you about a lot of other surprises, and date nights too but you know, more is always better than less and who said that it has to be a day and not the week or even forever.

So, how about a website? Or a Radio Surprise? Or a movie date night? Or a doorstep surprise? OR a lot more!!

You see, your love is forever then why would we give you just 5 options and hence, the 5th option is an [OPTION GALORE](https://jusst4you.com/)! Check it out and Enjoy!

Waiting for your pictures!

![gift-cards-vs-personalized-gifts](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/Gift-cards-vs-Personalized-Gifts-825x510-1-600x338.png)

## Why Should You Choose Them and Why Not?

Some people say that the best gifts come from the heart, not the store, while others would rather just take cash and be on their way. The world wouldn’t be so colorful if all the people were the same. Modern times have definitely brought a lot of good things into our lives, one of them is ‘Gift-cards’. However, some people feel more connected towards their loved ones when they receive a personalized gift. But where does that leave you when you want to give someone a gift and just can’t decide?

As a \*gift to you to help you decide, we have listed some of the Pros and Cons of Gift-cards and Personalized gifts.

## GIFT CARDS

### Pros

![Tfg The Freebie Guy GIF - Tfg TheFreebieGuy Juliesfreebies GIFs](https://lh4.googleusercontent.com/XWXm0atyjcQh-YYo2YpFQTYH0ShPWTR2ana9TPTSAT3lND4m4tJhq6SIMl67PzveyIJw_5YnxTBMmK4tcpwvuixspLVeiomeDhUE4F8_5Chq2-Ve9XnM7u5mXxo7VjiSO9-tk6sB_sPolwB_)

- **They are versatile**: These days, you can give a gift card to people for literally anything. Gift cards are all-rounders when it comes to occasions. Be it weddings, birthdays. Anniversaries, baby showers, promotions, or just a tough Monday. (We all need them. Believe it or not.)
- **People can pick whatever they want**: In gift cards, you just have to choose the store for which the card is. You won’t even have to do that if you just pick a gift card from Amazon since it has practically everything.
- **They come with many offers**: Gift cards often come with recharge offers or cashback rewards and bonuses that your loved ones receive while they shop.
- **They are convenient**: Gift cards can be sent from any place and time to anywhere. You won’t have to wait for the package to reach on time, or get damaged on the way. You’ll definitely, won’t have to worry about keeping them safe until you get to your loved ones.

### Cons

![Gabe The Office GIF - Gabe TheOffice Job GIFs](https://lh5.googleusercontent.com/tTFXME_xZfT7uGxLhFl98ezerBDGMGP7jR1afYH9TLgdcZUlyZiVY_Y7XfsWSqAq3TL8aWbiYP5f0VNazDUa1UH58rO4FvCUF0GFsvCwXqDDBy62QNeCAxQQtNkI9f-QUvqYz_c-hXO2CdAf)

- **They kill the ‘surprise element’**: There is no anticipation on people’s faces when they see a gift card. It’ll make them happy, but it won’t make them think as they receive it.
- **A bit less attractive**: It’s not anybody’s fault that gift cards are 2 inches tall and weigh 10 grams. Ofcourse, their value is 100 times more than that, but you have to admit, they don’t look that good.
- **Not suitable for the elderly**: Kudos to you if you have tech-savvy grandparents. But most people don’t. Not everyone can give their grandparents a gift card and expect to see a smile on their faces instead of horrors and confusion redeeming it. It’s sad but it’s true
- **Budget restricted**: The wonders of gift cards are not unlimited. Your loved ones might feel financially restricted while using your card.

## PERSONALIZED GIFTS

### Pros

![Open Me GIF - Gift Gifts Present GIFs](https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/IwWWCfUaJUAcow7_OhYjcEoBMwIPLNS3Giw_29jvJEu18I9HilPVMoVDj6BKm3IkXaIYvIahZs8NdxeRcsFpv5rwcvBL57jdAK0HfyBiLsQsKJ54bdAy9kpQCPJuprZugcClEsShtVHL1eSu)

- **More traditional**: The culture of giving gifts exists everywhere on the planet. Even the Statue of Liberty was a gift to the USA from France. In India, our cultural practices often regard gifts as ‘Shubh’ or holy for occasions.
- **They are emotional**: When you use something that has been gifted to you by your loved one, you instantly think of them and it puts a smile on your face. Personalized gifts make an emotional connection between two people and leave an impression on your heart.
- **The anticipation**: Remember when you were a kid and couldn’t stop looking at the pile of gifts your friends brought for you at your birthday party? The anticipation of what’s in the box is the same throughout your lifetime. Personalized gifts come with suspense and excitement.
- **They are unique**: Personalized gifts sometimes can be inscribed when personal messages and thoughts. Reading them makes you feel warm and secure in your heart. They’re even better when they are handmade because it shows the devotion of a person to you.

![Presente GIF - Excited Gift Kid GIFs](https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/35BqbbJWsqv5gahXG7D0o8PAIOWZJwg2oszghZgfMEZnfuSpnoRZVsF0rabb-YmzhvwyP0x-_TMwx9s0yzzyVn8JhQ3WO0NYhkjMEkQM0Fh6IqbVE8KWJrKRZSvuK2Vdsf0FT-iqfzU3zhM7)

### Cons

![Think Pooh GIF - Think Pooh WinnieThePooh GIFs](https://lh6.googleusercontent.com/DyfEc0b3SsOVNK4ipmyuUeKJiPiKnuDWF26xlwL5DuYFpbP9Cn6pucNfP6gIIpZ3lv-INpldyZexhXVSMziyvZfXSxxcpWmRsBOylSLZOdTsPd-A_d6S9MFpfT4K1A8w7mC5n_WKo1P4AfK6)

- **They are time-consuming**: The worst gifts are the last-minute gifts that you buy in urgency and guilt (\*yikes). But it’s also true that sometimes you are just short on time. You need to pre-plan what you’re about to gift someone or it won’t be as good.
- **Thoughtfulness**: You need to know someone really well to gift them something they need or like. More often than not, these gifts just end up sitting on the show-case or in a drawer, or worse, – REGIFTED (\*Cringe)
- **Can’t return them**: Personalized gifts are permanent. Hate ‘em, like ‘em, you’ll have to keep them anyway.

![10-books-to-gift-to-every-booklover-in-your-life](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/9-1.png)

The saying goes like a book is a gift you can open again and again. That is probably why the only thing a book lover cares about is Books! (And rightfully so). It is a fact that a book gifted to someone lasts in their memories forever. But it is also a fact that it is very difficult to please book lovers. So, what should you do?

To impress that little book lover in you, or the one you know, the following are 10 books recommended by book lovers to gift every book lover in your life.

## ‘Pride and prejudice’ by Jane Austen 1813

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/1-1.png)

This romantic work of art by Jane Austen is probably adored by every historical romance/drama admirer. Probably why it was even adapted to a movie! The book revolves around the love story of Elizabeth Bennet and Fitzwilliam Darcy and their struggles of getting over their differences. This one is always spoken of highly by critiques.

## The forty rules of love by Elif Shafak

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/2.png)

After reading Sufi poet Rumi and Shams of Tabriz, and his forty rules of life and love, the protagonist Ella’s life is turned around despite having a husband and a happy family. This roller-coaster ride entails Ella’s journey through understanding love. This book is a heavy dose of romance for intellectuals, and a must-have for every book lover.

## The sun is also a star by Nicola Yoon

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/3.png)

This is a story of two individuals with lives that are poles apart, and so are their minds. But the universe has something else planned for them. From having problems of their own to colliding together for love, this one will leave you happy, sad, confused, and wanting for more!

## Looking for Alaska by John Green

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/4.png)

Tell your book lover that this one is written by John Green. That’s pretty much it. The book is an award-winning work of modern contemporary, on its way to become a modern classic.

## The last song by Nicholas Spark

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/5.png)

Adapted into a 2010 film, The last song follows the story of a teenager rebuilding her relationship with her father and falling in love with a boy over the summer in a beach town of the southern united states.

## The Fault in Our Stars by John Green

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/6.png)

If you cried in the movie, you are not ready for this book. Pure, innocent, and tragic, fault in our stars tasks us through the journey of Hazel Grace and Augustus Waters. Through thick and thin, highs and lows, the story of Hazel and Augustus give you a glimpse of real love and inevitable grief.

## Gone with the wind by Margaret Mitchell

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/7.png)

Set in the time of civil war, this is a classic and belongs to everyone’s bookshelves. The story is of a girl who tries to survive the difficulties of war, get over a broken heart, and establish a business for herself.

## Great Expectations by Charles Dickens

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/8.png)

When an orphaned Pip falls in love with mind-numbingly beautiful Estella, his world starts to change from the ‘great expectations he has from her. Often regarded as Charles Dicken’s best work, this classic is worth your time.

## Anna Karenina by Leo Tolstoy

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/9.png)

The story of failed love, illicit affairs, and reawakened passion, this one makes you question your will to love someone and asks you ‘how far can you go to find love?’

## The Notebook by Nicholas Sparks

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/07/10.png)

This heartbreakingly beautiful love story set in the pre-and post-world war era takes us through the lives of Noah, Allie, and their everchanging love. This one is considered Nicholas spark’ masterpiece by some people.

Each and every one of these books is guaranteed to bring you waves of every emotion known to exist in humans, so they will surely leave an impact on your loved ones. They won’t be able to put these books down even for a second and will think of you on every page they read.

![top-bohemian-cabanas-which-are-most-trending](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/j4u-blog-6-825x510-1-600x338.png)

As restaurants around the world began to reopen after the lockdown, they had to devise ways to ensure the wellbeing of their customers during the global pandemic. Restaurants have taken steps to make dining out a healthy experience, such as focusing on al fresco dining and adding plastic shields around tables to prevent the virus from spreading. To draw customers, several restaurants are adopting new seating plans, introducing concepts such as party pods or private cabins, and also offering exclusive deals on dining in or also for [cabana room decorations](https://www.festop.in/pc/romantic-decoration/cabana-decoration-at-home/). While candlelight dinner or dinner by the lakeside is always going to be a favorite among people but how about adding a twist to it by setting it up under a bohemian cabana. This is something new and unique and, at the same time, safe and romantic in such challenging times. We provide you with some cabana options that you can look out for so that you can have a pleasant dining experience along with safety.

## **Top bohemian cabana that are romantic yet safe in corona**

### **[1\. Cabana on the beach-](https://jusst4you.com/product/cabana-on-the-beach/)**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/06/cabana-candle-light-dinner-8-300x300.jpg)

Sometimes romance just has to be stimulated, and we’ve planned the ideal dinner date for you. The atmosphere of the venue will ensure that you and your partner have a long, satisfying meal while having a lovely conversation about life, love, the world, and beyond. The decor is elegant, the seating is varied, and the menu options – both food and drinks – are plentiful. It is one of the most relaxing places in town, with excellent service. The artistically presented food and courteous service will make you fall in love with the experience. In just a few taps, you can add a touch of love to your special someone’s day by ordering a cake, a flower bouquet, or a private guitarist. This cabana on the beach option with a private cabana dining setup will be an excellent idea to remain safe and enjoy the candlelight dinner with your loved ones.

### [2\. **The den cabana-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/the-den-cabana/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/The-Den-Cabana-in-Delhi2-300x300.jpg)

Making memories that will last a lifetime! Keep your love and memories close to your heart at all times. Feel enamored with the natural beauty of the lakeshore. Surprise your partner with a Luxury Date they’ll never forget. Allow for a rare and romantic moment, and engage in a profoundly intense connection with your loved one. There will be a Cabana reserved, which will be ideal for a romantic meal for two. A beautiful date with your loved one that you will value your whole life as well as the romantic environment.

### [3\. **Cabana on Roof-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/cabana-on-roof/)

![Rooftop cabana candle light dinner - Jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/cabana-8-300x300.jpg)

If you’re looking for a unique place to take your partner for his or her birthday or anniversary amidst the coronavirus, this is the ideal gift to send to your partner. Bring your significant other to this lovely and spacious private cabana with light decor and flowers. Enjoy a special evening at Radisson Blu, one of Delhi’s most beautiful hotels, with a 4-course candlelight dinner in a cabana set-up for just the two of you. This would undoubtedly make an excellent romantic getaway.

### [4\. **Cabana date at your place-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/cabana-date-at-your-place/)

![cabana at your place - Jusst4you](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/white-world-4-1-300x300.png)

On your loved one’s special day, skip the cliched date nights and do something like this instead. Experience the beauty of a cabana at your home, complete with lovely decor and a candlelight date. Surprise them with this one-of-a-kind date while enjoying total privacy and creating memories that will last a lifetime. If you want to spend some romantic moments with your special someone at your home while also doing something special and staying safe amidst the pandemic,  a Cabana date at your home is a great option.

### [5\. **Swing cabana candlelight-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/swing-cabana-candlelight-in-south-delhi/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/01/swing-canopy-4-300x300.jpg)

Candlelight dinner in a posh locality fully decorated with fairy lights, LED props, lanterns, cages, lamps, tealight candles, and, of course, a private butler on a private terrace reserved for you. Doesn’t that sound sensual? It does, indeed. Just the two of you and a beautifully done cabana setup is a perfect combination to drool for a while, keeping yourself safe at the same time.

### [6\. **Cabana tent in a garden-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/cabana-tent-in-a-garden/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/tent-in-the-garden-8-300x300.jpg)

A completely surreal feeling to impress your loved ones. Capture the atmosphere of a romantic film with snacks provided by a private butler in a private bohemian cabana with just the two of you as viewers. Start the experience off right by lining the path to the setting with scented candles and flower petals, both of which are well known for their love-sparking properties. Plan this big surprise for that movie-obsessed, film-obsessed special friend.

### [7\. **Romantic stay with Cabana decoration-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/romantic-stay-with-cabana-decorations/)

![bohemian cabana](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/08/canopy-with-stay-1-300x300.jpg)

Every special day, such as a birthday or an anniversary, is a day of love, a day when couples exchange presents and spend quality time together. You can make this day even more special by booking this private cabana decor stay. Why give cliche presents to your loved ones when you can give them beautiful memories? This experience will captivate your loved ones and make them feel at the pinnacle! There will be an immersive atmosphere with candles, flower petals for decoration, and much more!

## **Conclusion**

These not-so-boring yet safe dining ideas are the new normal, as you would say in times of Corona. While you enjoy a romantic dinner night with your loved ones, you can be stress-free and feel safe with these bohemian cabana set up, which is explicitly made for few people.

![some-offbeat-digital-surprises-to-give-in-this-tough-phase](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/05/j4u-blog-7-825x510-1-600x338.png)

Having fun is all about food, drink, sightseeing, doing, and going out into the world. There are still plenty of things to eat, drink, see, and do, even though there is nowhere to go due to the coronavirus pandemic. Right now, they just look a little strange. Many special events that fell during the lockdown time were not fully celebrated until the declaration of the lockdown. Social networking has become the latest venue for making special announcements and virtual celebrations. There’s always a way to surprise somebody! Couples must find imaginative, deliberate ways to spend quality time with each other while they are stuck in the house together. Whether it’s a game night, a movie night, or anything more intimate, it’s important to nurture your relationship and cultivate meaningful communication, particularly in the face of a global crisis. So, before you can go to the bar, try a new restaurant, fly, go dancing, see a show, see a movie, or simply hug a friend, we’ve got you covered with digital surprises and experiences that you can give your loved ones during such challenging times when things are gloomy outside.

## **Some offbeat digital surprises to give in this tough phase**

Let’s dive into some of the unique and out-of-the-box digital surprises to bring a smile to your loved one’s face during such tough times.

### [1) **Love Map-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/love-map/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/1-300x300.jpg)

This digital surprise is something you might not have heard of before. You might have used the map to locate your desired location many times, but something like a love map is relatively a new concept. Do you remember the place where you and your partner met? Most of us forget such an important event in our lives. Each place holds its significance in the life of an individual. You can now show your love for them by giving them this beautiful romantic framed map to commemorate the meeting of your holy souls. Get this exclusive gift to show how important they are in your life. The gift would include an A4 size frame with some pictures and personalized messages and the location of the place where you met.

### [2) **Love Android App-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/love-android-app/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/personalized-app-1-300x300.jpg)

Now is the time to book this fantastic and exclusive surprise concept, and you will remember their reaction for the rest of your life. Every day, we use a variety of applications. Health apps, shopping apps, booking apps, and even photo editing apps are all available. Consider creating an app for your loved ones that includes their photos as well as your messages. This app can be a symbol of your affection, as well as a private space of love where no one can see your tender moments of love and affection. One innovative idea is to get a personalized app made for your girlfriend with all your beautiful memories saved in it forever.

### [3) **Digital Flashmob-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/digital-flashmob-the-really-virtual-proposal/)

![Digital Surprises](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/07/VIRTUAL-FLASHMOB-300x300.jpg)

Many significant events were ruined by the 2020 COVID-19 pandemic. Because of the “social distancing” factors, many unions and marriages have been postponed. All you have to do is tell us your favorite song and what the occasion is—whether it’s a proposal, a casual love expression, or even a surprise! Our talented dance team will put on a fantastic 5-minute show for you and your loved one that will make you feel like a star! Since Zoom is the latest trend, the days of Facebook and other platforms are numbered! As a result, we’re giving you a novel way to propose online via our exclusive digital surprises!

### [4) **Digital Magic Show-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/live-magic-show/)

![Digital Surprises](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/magic-show-300x300.jpg)

If you have your kid’s birthday in the lockdown and cannot celebrate it and your child is missing their friends on their special day. You can surprise him and his friends digitally by arranging a live magic show. This way, your child will feel as if he is celebrating his special day with his friends though virtually. The live magic show package will include live magic tricks, a 15-minute performance over video conferencing by a professional magician. This would be a fantastic digital surprise for your kid and would make his day even more special.

### [5) **Panda Messenger**–](https://jusst4you.com/product/panda-messenger/)

![Digital Surprises](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Panda-messenger-300x300.jpg)

Who doesn’t love to cuddle with a giant panda, and if that panda can come to your home to wish you on your special day, then what could be a better gift? The panda would virtually come to your house and express the feelings and words you would want to deliver to your loved one. It will be a digital surprise through video conferencing, which a huge panda would perform with ten personalized messages for your loved ones. This is a charming and adorable gifting idea to surprise your girlfriend.

### [6) **Selfie with Celebrity-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/selfie-with-celebrity/)

![Digital Surprises](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/selfie-with-celebrity-300x300.jpg)

Have you ever wished to meet a celebrity you admire? Have you ever tried to take only one photo of them and post it on social media? We’ve got you covered, don’t worry. Even you won’t be able to tell the difference between truth and naturalness in this picture. An image so accurate that everyone on your social media will believe it. Get this right now because it’s the best-selling product during this dreadful lockdown.

### [7) **Wish by Celebrity-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/wish-by-celebrity/)

![Digital Surprises](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/05/WISH-BY-CELEB-300x300.jpg)

What a thrill it is to get a call from someone who has already been on the big screen and has a million fans. Doesn’t it sound like a fantasy? We should make it a reality. Make a reservation for a celebrity impersonator to impress your loved one on their special day and perk up their spirit during the lockdown. Surprise your loved ones with celebrity wishes and make things a little fun, so they don’t have a boring moment in the day. Turn the day into something so memorable and exciting that they will remember it for years!

## **Conclusion**

Gifting has become more accessible and more relaxed as items become more digitized, thanks to virtual gifting surprises. These presents will not only surprise and delight your loved ones, but they will also keep you away from having to go out looking for a gift in the middle of the covid-19 pandemic.

data.markdown:
[Call Now](tel:+918448441055)

![safer-gifting-ideas-in-the-covid-times](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/j4u-blog-4-825x510-1-600x338.png)

Gifting has always been exciting, whether it is receiving it or giving it. Thinking of a gift is a humongous task. A gift that meets the personality of the person or something unique and memorable. There are many options indeed when you step into the market. But since the pandemic hit us hard, things have changed, and so has the way of gifting. With the norms of social distancing and lockdown restrictions, your loved ones would be celebrating their birthdays or special days at home. You can make their day special by delivering them gifts at their doorstep. While we are all seeing each other through zoom meets, we can look for safe gifting ideas that you can give just by a click of your finger. And a brownie point – it won’t break the bank also. You can choose digital gifting options that will keep you at home amidst the covid-19 pandemic and still manage to bring a big smile to your loved ones face. We provide you with such safe gifting ideas that are a great option in covid times.

## **Safer gifting ideas in the COVID times**

While choosing the ideal gift for someone unique in your life has become more difficult in the COVID-19 period, we don’t have to give up this simple pleasure to the outbreak. Amid the coronavirus outbreak, a digital gift is not unique but also secure. With so many options available, you can look for some virtual gifting ideas that can make your loved one go aww with love.

### [**Virtual violinist-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/virtual-violinist/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/violinist-300x300.jpg)

How about a person playing the violin on your favourite song and you get lost in the melody? It would be a great surprise, indeed. You can surprise your loved ones during such challenging times by getting their favourite song played by a personalised violinist on your mobile screen and see your loved one amazed with the melodious song. In this package, you get 15 minutes of a live violinist performing digitally with your requested song and a personalised message. And guess what, you can book this surprise at an unmatched price. So, what are you waiting for surprise your loved ones to enjoy the beautiful melody?

### [**Panda messenger-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/panda-messenger/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Panda-messenger-300x300.jpg)

Who doesn’t love to cuddle with a giant panda, and if that panda can come to your home to wish you on your special day, then what could be a better gift? The panda would virtually come to your house and express the feelings and words you would want to deliver to your loved one. It will be a digital surprise through video conferencing, which a huge panda would perform with ten personalised messages for your loved ones. This is a charming and adorable gifting idea to surprise your girlfriend.

### [**Your Instagram Grid**–](https://jusst4you.com/product/your-instagram-grid/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/Personalized-instagram-grid-300x300.jpg)

Another unique digital surprise during COVID times is the Instagram Grid. With the popularity of social media handles like Instagram and Facebook among people these days. This Instagram grid can make for an excellent digital gift idea. Everybody loves having pictures on Instagram and watching stories. It would be exciting to have a personalised Instagram handle with their favourite photos and posts on it. The surprise will include 45 Instagram posts with pictures and messages shared digitally with the person to be surprised. Isn’t it cool?

### **[Live magic show-](https://jusst4you.com/product/live-magic-show/)**

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/magic-show-300x300.jpg)

If you have your kids birthday in the lockdown and cannot celebrate it and your child is missing their friends on their special day. You can surprise him and his friends digitally by arranging a live magic show. This way, your child will feel as if he is celebrating his special day with his friends though virtually. The live magic show package will include live magic tricks, a 15-minute performance over video conferencing by a professional magician. This would be a fantastic digital surprise for your kid and would make his day even more special.

### [**Weekly yoga session-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/weekly-yoga-session/)

![yoga session - digital surprises](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/04/yoga-session-300x300.jpg)

With these covid times being tough on us, it is essential to keep ourselves stress-free and happy. As we are confined in our houses, we cannot go out for any physical activity. We can gift our loved ones the gift of health by giving them a yoga session package. You can even gift this to your partner and show him how much you care for him and his well-being. The weekly yoga session includes 1-hour yoga session by a professional yoga instructor over video conferencing for a week every day. This is a great gifting idea to keep oneself safe and also keep ones mind relaxed and stress-free.

## **Conclusion**

With things becoming digitised everywhere, gifting has also become easy and comfortable with such virtual gifting surprises. These gifts will not only make your loved ones surprised and happy but also keep you safe without having to go out to look for a gift amidst the covid-19 pandemic.

![best-surprise-birthday-gift-ideas-for-your-parents](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/march-2-825x510-1-600x338.png)

One relationship that stands out from all others is that of parent and infant. A kid grew up surrounded by their parents’ unwavering affection. They are the true caregivers, and no one else on the planet can compare. They make every effort to ensure that their children have every convenience in life. We must periodically express our affection for our parents. We must regularly express our affection for our parents. And what better way to commemorate their birthdays than to do so in a special way? Here are some suggestions to help you make your parents’ birthday a special one.

## **Some surprise birthday gift ideas for your father**

Your father was the first man you ever fell in love with. You loved riding high on his back or doing a superman flight with his strong hands. You’ll never forget the joy he used to bring to your birthday parties. It’s now your turn to make your Dad’s birthday one to remember. Here, we provide you with the best surprise birthday gift ideas to leave your father teary-eyed.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/1-300x300.png)

1. You can opt for a customised [booze bouquet](https://jusst4you.com/product/booze-bouquet/), which can be the best for those who love drinking or keep a collection of it. They get some of their favourite brands and have a personalised note and a few pictures to customise the touch. The gift will instantly add buzz to your evening and bring that big smile to your man’s face.
2. One of the most unique and memorable gifts for anyone, which is sure to leave them teary-eyed. You can [name a star](https://jusst4you.com/product/dedicate-a-star/) on your father and let their legacy live forever.
3. [Personalised poetry](https://jusst4you.com/product/your-own-poetry/)– you can get customised poetry written for your father and express all your feelings in that poem. This will be something unusual and least expected by your father.
4. You can also get a [personalised slideshow video](https://jusst4you.com/product/personalized-slideshow-video/) with their family pictures and a heartwarming message for you. This can be a great way to make him feel special.
5. If your father isn’t the kind to enjoy celebrations and get-togethers, you should give him this thoughtful gift. We are certain that it will transport you and your father back in time and that the pleasant memories will bring you closer together. Maybe you’ll laugh; you’ll perhaps cry; maybe you’ll just be lost in old memories. To show your love, you don’t need words. So, dig out those old albums and make them into a [memory wall](https://jusst4you.com/product/memory-wall/).
6. They must have a favourite spot where they would like to spend the whole day; it could be a favourite park, a restaurant, a nightclub, or a nearby location to which you could take them on a day trip or a road trip. Celebrating their birthday in their favourite location might not be a better idea.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/memory-wall-300x300.jpg)

## **Some surprise birthday gift ideas for your mother**

The person who gave you life and brought you into this world is your mother. She is the most amazing friend anyone will ever have. It is said that since God cannot be present at all times, he produced a mother. As a result, you have every excuse to make her birthday one remember. Here, we give you some unique and pleasant birthday gift ideas that will surprise her to the core and make you give her a big hug.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/6a-300x300.jpg)

1. [Clip your memories](https://jusst4you.com/product/clip-your-memories/)– one of the best ideas is to collect all the pictures of you and your mother and capture them all on the web. These pictures will stay with her forever and make for a good birthday gift. The most beautiful gift that will brighten up your relationship is Clip Your Memories, which contains your beautiful, cherishable memories. This web of your photographic memories is a wonderful gift that your loved one will treasure for a long time. Give it to your mother to make them happy.
2. Handmade gifts- if you are looking for something with a more personalised touch to it, you can consider giving your mother handmade gifts like a [handmade scrapbook](https://jusst4you.com/product/handmade-scrapbook/), explosion box, LED collage, messages in a box, etc.
3. You can also gift her a customised coffee mug with her picture on it or a cute caption that reminds her of you whenever she sips her tea in it.
4. If you want to plan something indoors, you can surprise your mother on her birthday is to decorate her room with balloons and lights with her pictures. This is known as the [birthday balloon decoration.](https://jusst4you.com/product/birthday-balloon-decoration/)  So, when your mother sees this creative decoration with images, fairy lights, and a bright, colourful backdrop, delight them and make them go aww. You won’t need to look for anything else because this surprise will include anything you might want to give someone for their birthday, so go ahead and order this magnificent decoration.
5. What could be more relaxing than a good massage to relieve her from the daily household chores? Gifting a [spa package](https://jusst4you.com/product/spa-day/) can be a great birthday gift to relax and enjoy on her special day.
6. Balloons have always been a symbol of happiness. What better way to wish your loved ones than by showing your personalised messages or placing special notes inside to make your surprise more interesting with those beautiful multicoloured bunch of balloons? It’s a great feeling to wake up in the morning and see the balloons reaching for you with those lovely messages.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Spa-in-delhi-2-300x300.jpg)

## **Conclusion**

Last but not least, at the end of the day, look her in the eyes and tell her how much you love and care about her. This is the easiest but most thoughtful birthday gift you might give your mother. Whatever you do, put your heart and soul into it. Remember, he’s your father, and he knows whether you’re giving it your all or not. Give him a day he’ll remember for a long time.

data.markdown:
[Call Now](tel:+918448441055)

![best-custom-gifts-to-give-in-2021](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/march-1-825x510-1-600x338.png)

It’s all about being thoughtful regarding gift-giving, so the more personalised you can get, the better. It doesn’t matter if you customise it—monograms, portraits, astrological signs, you name it—what matters is that you’ve chosen something they’ll enjoy and that is special to them. There’s something for everyone (seriously, everyone—Mom, Dad, your BFF, your girlfriend, the list goes on) from customised jewellery and monogrammed mugs to a throw blanket made from a full-on handwritten love letter and a custom planter made to look like their pet. And, to top it off, these personalised gifts are timeless, so if you’re shopping for Christmas, birthdays, a housewarming party, or just because, we’ve got you covered. Giving has just been a whole lot simpler.

## **Custom gifts to give in 2021**

Personalised gifts can stand out in a crowd. They’re perfect for hard-to-shop-for people and for leaving a lasting impression. At Jusst4you, provide you with a list of some amazing custom made gifts for your loved ones and make them feel go awe in appreciation.

### **[Customised T-shirts-](https://jusst4you.com/product/customized-printed-t-shirt/)**

How about gifting t-shirts that can reflect your memories and make that person feel extra special. T-shirts emblazoned with your messages or memories can be a truly unique gift. Book a t-shirt in your favourite colour, and we’ll customise it for you with a special message or picture! It is available in sizes ranging from small to 4XL, allowing everyone to show their family pride. For the ultimate gifting experience, personalise it with family names, titles, and 15 different names.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Personalized-Tshirt-1-300x300.jpg)

### **[Name album](https://jusst4you.com/product/name-album/)–**

This one-of-a-kind name album might be the ideal present for anyone special in your life. Give them this beautiful gift to show them how much you adore them! It is important to make others feel special if you love them. And giving a unique gift is a vital part of the process. Show your loved ones how much you care for them. Give this personalised name album to your loved ones to make them feel unique and to convey your feelings for them. Tell us their names, and we’ll create this awesome gift for you to send as a surprise on a special occasion.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/WhatsApp-Image-2019-07-29-at-13.14.06-1-300x300.jpeg)

### **[Handmade scrapbook](https://jusst4you.com/product/handmade-scrapbook/)–**

A treasure trove of knowledge. And those gems are the memories you wish you could relive, all the little moments you want to remember. There is nothing more lovely than giving someone a book filled with memories. Make a memorable day for your loved one by purchasing this handcrafted scrapbook. Scrapbooks never go out of style. It is, in fact, a memory lane where you can express your feelings to your loved one on each scrapbook page. This lovely scrapbook is handcrafted and contains five pages with your pictures, a note, and a treasure trove of memories to share with your loved ones. This is a truly unique gift! This handmade scrapbook will include 25-30 pictures with personalised messages.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/13b-300x300.jpg)

### **[Explosion cage](https://jusst4you.com/product/explosion-cage/)–**

Are you looking for a cute way to startle your significant other? This designer present will add warmth to your relationship! A memory cage that sheds light on your relationship. A cage of memories and special moments spent with your partner, all the times that they made you feel like you were on top of the planet. You must, however, repay them with all your love and affection. – This cage will tell you to do that in a whole new way. A present that you and your loved ones will treasure for the rest of your lives. We offer you the same old gift that will make your partner fall in love with you.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/15b-300x300.jpg)

### **[Caricature mini-dolls](https://jusst4you.com/product/caricature-mini-dolls/)–**

When you personalise each gift, you can ensure that you’re giving the recipient something special. You can prove that you put extra time and thought into your gifts by adding a particular letter, their favourite image, or their name or monogram.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/caricature-proposal-300x300.jpg)

### **[LED collage](https://jusst4you.com/product/led-collage-heart-shape-led-collage/)–**

Make your relationship even more beautiful with this lovely picture collage, which is bordered by fairy lights and features many memories in the form of pictures. A lovely present to brighten your special someone’s day! The LED photo collage has many images that you can supply and is surrounded by dazzling fairy lights. This will certainly brighten up your room, as well as your relationship!

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/04/LED-Collage1-300x300.jpg)

### **[Personalised woodcrafts](https://jusst4you.com/product/personalized-woodcrafts/)–**

A personal touch to a gift makes it even more memorable, and the memories created are treasured. Making their day even more special by surprising them with one-of-a-kind handmade woodcrafts gifts. What could be better than a gift with a distinctly vintage appeal? Gift them unique wooden hand made items, such as a wall hanging with an intricately etched couple picture, engraved wood signs or wooden nameplates, or even cool stuff like wood sunglasses, to commemorate some special occasion or a milestone.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Woodcraft-personalized-1-300x300.jpg)

### **[Photo puzzle](https://jusst4you.com/product/photo-puzzle/)–**

Do you want to make your gift both romantic and enjoyable? Add a dash of gaming to the mix. This picture puzzle is the best gift because it blends memories with a game! Surprise your loved ones by purchasing this wonderful gift! Enough of the same tired, uninteresting presents. We’ve got a brand-new concept here. Do you want to make your gift both romantic and enjoyable? Add a dash of gaming to the mix. Give us a picture that you’d like to see on the puzzle, and we’ll take care of the rest. This 30x20cm puzzle might be the ideal entertaining present for you. Give it to your special people without telling them what’s inside. Enable them to sort it out and come up with a solution.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Photo-puzzle-1-300x300.jpg)

### **[Photo calendar](https://jusst4you.com/product/photo-calendar/)–**

Send this one-of-a-kind customised calendar of memories to that unique individual. Turn your pictures into beautiful wall or laptop calendars that you’ll enjoy all year. Allow them to savour the memories every day by giving them this thoughtful gift. A calendar is one of the most important things we use every day. Why not make the easy calendar a spotlight for moments close to your affection because we spend so much time referring to it for all our important events and plans. Share your most memorable moments with us so that we can create something special and romantic for your loved one. You should go through it if you feel nostalgic to relive the exact moments you love. The cheerful photos will not only brighten your day, but they will also serve as excellent conversation starters.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/3-11-300x300.jpg)

### **[Thread art](https://jusst4you.com/product/thread-art/)–**

With words, shapes, and portraits made of wood, nails, and thread, the lost thread art technique of depiction is revived. Create a unique gift for your loved one by weaving all of your thoughts and affection into the strands of thread art. Gifts become more valuable when thought and effort are placed into them. So, with colourful threads entangled to create artistically embroidered words, forms, and portraits, we offer you the most thoughtful gift.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/3c-300x300.jpeg)

## **Conclusion**

When you give someone something that appeals to them personally, it becomes more than a gift or a token of your gratitude. It becomes a symbol of your relationship and the exclusive bond you share. It demonstrates that you respect their uniqueness, which everyone needs in this world: to be respected and valued for who they are. And whats better than custom made gifts for them.
