![seven-mind-blowing-hampers-of-all-time](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/j4u-blog-3-825x510-1-600x338.png)

There are also times when you want to lure your loved ones with different presents, such as birthdays. You could get intimidated and confused with so many gifting choices on the market. In such cases, a gift hamper is one of the most common and fashionable gifting choices! That’s right, yeah! A gift hamper is a term that is quite common and somewhat misunderstood. A food box or fruit basket is not always a gift hamper. For a birthday or every other day, there are countless possibilities for a gift hamper basket. Books, chocolates, decorative items, music collections, suits, drinks, or even accessories for electronics can be included! Any person will be pleased to receive a basket full of his/her favorite treats, and on his/her face would undoubtedly form a smile. Gift hampers are one of the most flexible gifting choices because you can put something in them depending on the person or your budget. Gift hampers often come with great uncertainty alongside a wide variety of options. We at Jusst4you give you a selection of versatile and handpicked gift hamper baskets online to ease the process of buying gift hampers basket online. Many hampers include different items such as soft toys, picture frames, chocolates, roses, key chains, and much more that can be easily picked.

## **Seven mind-blowing hampers of all time**

We provide you with seven such hamper ideas that will surely blow your loved one’s mind and make them feel special and wanted. Let’s have a look at some of the mind-blowing hampers to swoon them away.

### **Canopy hamper**–

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/canopy-hamper-200x300.jpeg)

How about a hamper made in the form of a canopy with all those beautiful items in it. A beautifully decorated wooden tray with the props of your choice with breathtaking artificial flowers and leaves decoration. The hamper consists of a bamboo plant, some brownies, a pack of almonds, a jar of cake and a biodegradable notepad with a customized card with their picture and a message card. It also comes with a mini easel stand, and to lighten it up, it comes with LED fairy lights and premium white fur. Who would not drool over this tastefully created hamper?

### **The crystal hamper**–

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/crystal-hamper-225x300.jpeg)

How pretty it would be to receive a hamper made of glass and looks so chic and sophisticated. Nobody would mind that. This crystal hamper consists of a mood card, a customized card, an A4 size frame, messages in a bottle, one novel, some bookmarks, some quirky badges, a mini easel prop, a cute soft toy, some miniatures and some roses. Such a carefully crafted hamper, isn’t it?

### **Love hamper**–

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2021/03/Love-hamper-300x200.jpeg)

Now this hamper is for all the lovers out there. You can gift this hamper to anyone you want to express your love for and make them feel loved. This lovey-dovey hamper consists of a frame made of love alphabets, a pack of Ferrero Rocher, some fresh roses, some booze miniatures, small notes props and a golden wooden frame. How esthetically pleasing would the hamper look when you gift it to your special person who is sure to leave a big smile on their face.

### [**Booze bouquet-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/booze-bouquet/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/1-300x300.png)

You can opt for a customized booze bouquet, which can be the best for those who love drinking or keep a collection of it. They get some of their favorite brands and have a personalized note and a few pictures to give it a customized touch, some fresh flowers and some miniatures and props. The gift will instantly add buzz to your evening and bring that big smile to your man’s face.

### [**Mini chocolate basket**–](https://jusst4you.com/product/mini-chcolate-hamper/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Chocolate-day-gifts-valentines-1-300x300.jpg)

Ditch those cliché chocolate hampers and instead opt for the mini chocolate basket, which would be an excellent gift for someone who loves chocolates. A beautifully decorated pinewood basket comes with a jar of Nutella, some customized chocolates, and one custom note. How chocolaty and tempting does this sound?

### [**Pandora hampers-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/pandora-hamper/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/5-3-300x300.jpg)

A box full of surprises would make anyone go wow, isn’t it? This pandora hamper comes with a tastefully decorated tray with Paulo Coelho’s alchemist, some quirky badges, a band, and a custom tee shirt. A box full of surprises, indeed.

### [**The kiss basket-**](https://jusst4you.com/product/the-kiss-basket/)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2020/03/Kiss-day-gifts-3-300x300.jpg)

Whether you are in a long-distance relationship or in a mood to show your love through kisses, this hamper is for you. This lovely basket with a beautiful origami card, a graphic card, a kiss me Jar, some kiss cards, and customized notes is what dreams are made of.

## **Final Words-**

The meaning of hampers has evolved with time. It is no longer that old chocolate, fruits, or dry-fruit hampers, but hampers are now created with so much creativity and variety. You can get your hampers customized with the items of your choice. With these unique and mind-blowing gifting hampers, you can grace any occasion with ease and earn those brownie points from your loved ones.

# Private Yacht Candlelight

📍 Gateway of India, Mumbai

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Private yacht experience on MacGregor 26

- Capacity for up to 6 guests + 1 captain

- Romantic candlelight décor setup on the yacht

- 3-course North Indian meal (veg & non-veg options available)

- 30-minute motorboat transfer to reach the yacht

- Beautiful sailing ambience perfect for celebrations

Read more

Experience a truly unique celebration with our Private Yacht Candlelight Dining Experience. Set aboard the elegant MacGregor 26 yacht, this exclusive experience offers a romantic candlelight setup while you sail across serene waters. Perfect for intimate celebrations, the evening includes a delicious three-course North Indian meal with veg and non-veg options. With beautiful views, soft candlelight décor, and a private yacht setting, this experience creates the perfect atmosphere for romantic dates, proposals, or special celebrations.

Read more

- iThe experience duration is approximately 2 hours, including the 30-minute motorboat transfer.
- iThe yacht can accommodate up to 6 guests along with the captain.
- iThe package includes a 3-course North Indian meal with veg and non-veg options.
- iThe setup includes romantic candlelight décor on the yacht.
- iMultiple time slots are available, subject to availability.
- iPrior booking is required to reserve the yacht experience.
- iSailing experiences may be subject to weather and water conditions.
- iGuests are advised to arrive at the boarding point before the scheduled departure time.
- iAdditional services such as cake, decorations, or photography can be arranged at an extra cost.

Read more

Make your entrance the most memorable moment of someone’s day with Deliver Yourself – a creative and jaw-dropping surprise where _you become the gift_. This giant-sized, beautifully decorated box isn’t just for show – it’s your magical reveal moment!

Here’s how it works: we prepare a large box, exquisitely wrapped and decorated to resemble a premium gift. Inside the box, we place 15–20 hydrogen balloons that float up the moment the lid opens. And then – it’s you! The person they never expected, standing there in person, ready to wish, hug, propose, or just be the best part of their day.

Whether it’s for a birthday, anniversary, proposal, or a welcome-home surprise, this unforgettable gesture leaves a lasting impression. It brings laughter, joy, and possibly happy tears from the person you’re surprising. Plus, all travel and logistics are taken care of, so you just have to show up and enjoy the moment.

If you're looking for a fun, bold, and loving way to surprise someone, nothing beats the magic of delivering yourself in a giant surprise box. It's not just a gift – it's an experience.

# Privacy Policy

This privacy policy has been compiled to better serve those who are concerned with how their ‘Personally Identifiable Information’ (PII) is being used online. PII, as described in US privacy law and information security, is information that can be used on its own or with other information to identify, contact, or locate a single person, or to identify an individual in context. Please read our privacy policy carefully to get a clear understanding of how we collect, use, protect or otherwise handle your Personally Identifiable Information in accordance with our website.

#### **What personal information do we collect from the people that visit our blog, website or app?**

When ordering or registering on our site, as appropriate, you may be asked to enter your name, email address, mailing address, phone number or other details to help you with your experience.

#### **When do we collect information?**

We collect information from you when you register on our site, place an order, subscribe to a newsletter, fill out a form or enter information on our site.

#### **How do we use your information?**

We may use the information we collect from you when you register, make a purchase, sign up for our newsletter, respond to a survey or marketing communication, surf the website, or use certain other site features in the following ways:

- To personalize your experience and to allow us to deliver the type of content and product offerings in which you are most interested.
- To follow up with them after correspondence (live chat, email or phone inquiries)
- To allow us to better service you in responding to your customer service requests.
- To send periodic emails regarding your order or other products and services.
- To quickly process your transactions.

#### **How do we protect your information?**

Our website is scanned on a regular basis for security holes and known vulnerabilities in order to make your visit to our site as safe as possible. We use regular Malware Scanning. Your personal information is contained behind secured networks and is only accessible by a limited number of persons who have special access rights to such systems, and are required to keep the information confidential. In addition, all sensitive/credit information you supply is encrypted via Secure Socket Layer (SSL) technology. We implement a variety of security measures when a user places an order enters, submits, or accesses their information to maintain the safety of your personal information. All transactions are processed through a gateway provider and are not stored or processed on our servers.

#### **Do we use ‘cookies’?**

Yes. Cookies are small files that a site or its service provider transfers to your computer’s hard drive through your Web browser (if you allow) that enables the site’s or service provider’s systems to recognize your browser and capture and remember certain information. For instance, we use cookies to help us remember and process the items in your shopping cart. They are also used to help us understand your preferences based on previous or current site activity, which enables us to provide you with improved services. We also use cookies to help us compile aggregate data about site traffic and site interaction so that we can offer better site experiences and tools in the future.

#### **We use cookies to:**

**•** Help remember and process the items in the shopping cart.

**•** Understand and save user’s preferences for future visits.

**•** Keep track of advertisements.

You can choose to have your computer warn you each time a cookie is being sent, or you can choose to turn off all cookies. You do this through your browser settings. Since browser is a little different, look at your browser’s Help Menu to learn the correct way to modify your cookies.

#### **If users disable cookies in their browser:**

If you turn cookies off, Some of the features that make your site experience more efficient may not function properly.Some of the features that make your site experience more efficient and may not function properly.

#### **Third-party links**

Occasionally, at our discretion, we may include or offer third-party products or services on our website. These third-party sites have separate and independent privacy policies. We therefore have no responsibility or liability for the content and activities of these linked sites. Nonetheless, we seek to protect the integrity of our site and welcome any feedback about these sites.

#### **Third-party disclosure**

We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer to outside parties your Personally Identifiable Information unless we provide users with advance notice. This does not include website hosting partners and other parties who assist us in operating our website, conducting our business, or serving our users, so long as those parties agree to keep this information confidential. We may also release information when it’s release is appropriate to comply with the law, enforce our site policies, or protect ours or others’ rights, property or safety. However, non-personally identifiable visitor information may be provided to other parties for marketing, advertising, or other uses.

#### **Google**

Google’s advertising requirements can be summed up by Google’s Advertising Principles. They are put in place to provide a positive experience for users. https://support.google.com/adwordspolicy/answer/1316548?hl=en

We use Google AdSense Advertising on our website.

Google, as a third-party vendor, uses cookies to serve ads on our site. Google’s use of the DART cookie enables it to serve ads to our users based on previous visits to our site and other sites on the Internet. Users may opt-out of the use of the DART cookie by visiting the Google Ad and Content Network privacy policy.

#### **We have implemented the following:**

**•** Remarketing with Google AdSense

**•** Demographics and Interests Reporting

We, along with third-party vendors such as Google use first-party cookies (such as the Google Analytics cookies) and third-party cookies (such as the DoubleClick cookie) or other third-party identifiers together to compile data regarding user interactions with ad impressions and other ad service functions as they relate to our website.

#### **Opting out:**

Users can set preferences for how Google advertises to you using the Google Ad Settings page. Alternatively, you can opt out by visiting the Network Advertising Initiative Opt Out page or by using the Google Analytics Opt Out Browser add on.

#### **California Online Privacy Protection Act**

CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require any person or company in the United States (and conceivably the world) that operates websites collecting Personally Identifiable Information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals or companies with whom it is being shared. – See more at: http://consumercal.org/california-online-privacy-protection-act-caloppa/#sthash.0FdRbT51.dpuf

#### **According to CalOPPA, we agree to the following:**

Users can visit our site anonymously.

Once this privacy policy is created, we will add a link to it on our home page or as a minimum, on the first significant page after entering our website.

Our Privacy Policy link includes the word ‘Privacy’ and can easily be found on the page specified above.

You will be notified of any Privacy Policy changes:

**•** On our Privacy Policy Page

##### Can change your personal information:

**•** By emailing us

**•** By calling us

**•** By logging in to your account

**•** By chatting with us or by sending us a support ticket

##### **How does our site handle Do Not Track signals?**

We don’t honor Do Not Track signals and Do Not Track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track (DNT) browser mechanism is in place. We don’t honor them because:

##### **Does our site allow third-party behavioral tracking?**

It’s also important to note that we do not allow third-party behavioral tracking

#### **COPPA (Children Online Privacy Protection Act)**

When it comes to the collection of personal information from children under the age of 13 years old, the Children’s Online Privacy Protection Act (COPPA) puts parents in control. The Federal Trade Commission, United States’ consumer protection agency, enforces the COPPA Rule, which spells out what operators of websites and online services must do to protect children’s privacy and safety online. We do not specifically market to children under the age of 13 years old. Do we let third-parties, including ad networks or plug-ins collect PII from children under 13?

#### **Fair Information Practices**

The Fair Information Practices Principles form the backbone of privacy law in the United States and the concepts they include have played a significant role in the development of data protection laws around the globe. Understanding the Fair Information Practice Principles and how they should be implemented is critical to comply with the various privacy laws that protect personal information.

#### **In order to be in line with Fair Information Practices we will take the following responsive action, should a data breach occur:**

We will notify you via email within 7 business days .We also agree to the Individual Redress Principle which requires that individuals have the right to legally pursue enforceable rights against data collectors and processors who fail to adhere to the law. This principle requires not only that individuals have enforceable rights against data users, but also that individuals have recourse to courts or government agencies to investigate and/or prosecute non-compliance by data processors.

# Private Cabana Candlelight Dinner at Hyatt Place

📍 Hyatt, Udyog Vihar

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Private cabana candlelight dining setup at Hyatt Place

- Welcome drink on arrival for the couple

- Choice of any four dishes from the menu

- Decorated dining table with flowers and candles

- Rose petal pathway leading to the cabana

- Baskets placed around the pathway for decorative styling

- LED candles for ambient lighting

- White net décor with artificial flowers

- Personalized service during the experience

- Beautiful outdoor ambiance for a romantic evening

Read more

Enjoy a romantic evening with the Private Cabana Candlelight Dinner at Hyatt Place, designed for couples seeking an intimate outdoor dining experience. The beautifully arranged cabana features elegant décor with flowers, candles, white net drapes, and soft lighting that creates a dreamy ambiance. A rose petal pathway with LED candles and decorative baskets leads you to the setup, making the entrance truly special. Upon arrival, refreshing welcome drinks are served before you enjoy four delicious dishes of your choice from the menu. With personalized service and a peaceful outdoor atmosphere, this candlelight dinner promises a memorable and romantic celebration.

Read more

- iThis experience is designed for a couple (2 guests).
- iThe dining setup is arranged in a private outdoor cabana are
- iWelcome drinks will be served upon arrival.
- iGuests can choose any four dishes from the menu during the experience.
- iThe décor includes rose petals, candles, LED lighting, white net drapes, and floral decorations.
- iAdvance reservation is required to arrange the setup.
- iThe experience duration is typically 2–3 hours.

# Flash Mob Proposal

📍 At Your Place

Rated **5.00** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Flash mob proposal performance by 10 professional dancers

- Choreographed surprise routine (5–8 minutes)

- 10-feet proposal banner for the grand reveal

- Centralized music setup for the performance

- Coordinated surprise moment planning

Read more

Make your proposal unforgettable with our Flash Mob Proposal package. This exciting and heartwarming experience begins with 10 professional dancers who will surprise your partner with a stunning 3 to 4-minute dance performance. As the music begins, the dancers will seamlessly blend into the surroundings, creating a thrilling and unexpected atmosphere.

The highlight of the proposal comes when a grand 10-feet banner with your personalized proposal message is revealed, making this moment even more special. The dancers will lead your partner to the perfect spot, where you can pop the big question surrounded by music, dance, and romance.

The performance is choreographed to perfection and can be tailored to suit your partner's favorite song or a track that holds special meaning for both of you. With centralized music, the sound is crisp and clear, ensuring that everyone can enjoy the moment.

Whether you plan to propose at a public place, a private venue, or a romantic outdoor setting, our team will make sure everything is perfectly coordinated for a flawless surprise.

Read more

- iThe performance lasts approximately 5–8 minutes.
- iThe flash mob includes 10 trained professional dancers.
- iA 10-feet proposal banner will be revealed during the performance.
- iThe setup includes centralized music for the choreography.
- iThe experience works best in public places, malls, open venues, or large spaces.
- iPrior permissions may be required depending on the location.
- iAdvance booking is required to coordinate dancers and rehearsal planning.

Customized News Bulletin

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Customized News Bulletin

📍 At Your Place

Rated **4.50** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Professionally crafted 2.5 to 3-minute customized video
- Actor/actress acting as a news anchor
- Integration of 10–12 personal photos
- Engaging news bulletin-style script and presentation
- Background music and basic sound design
- High-quality video editing and transitions
- Final video delivered in digital format

Read more

Transform your special moments into a headline-worthy experience with our Customized News Bulletin.This unique gift features a professional actor or actress delivering a news segment that highlights your personal stories and memories.Using 10 to 12 of your selected photos, we create a 2.5 to 3-minute video that mimics a real news broadcast, complete with engaging visuals and commentary.

Whether it's for a birthday, anniversary, graduation, or any other significant occasion, this personalized news bulletin adds a creative and heartfelt touch to your celebration.The video is designed to be both entertaining and emotionally resonant, ensuring that your loved one feels truly special.

Read more

- iRequires 10–12 good quality photos for best results.
- iPersonal details and message must be shared in advance for scripting.
- iVideo duration will be approximately 2.5 to 3 minutes.
- iOne round of minor revisions may be included.
- iDelivery timeline will be shared at the time of booking.
- iFinal output will be shared digitally via a download link.
- iThis is a pre-recorded video and not a live session.
- iSuitable for occasions like birthdays, anniversaries, and proposals.

Read more

# Easel Proposal

📍 At Your Place

Rated **4.50** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Personalized message displayed on an elegant easel

- Foldable and sturdy wooden easel stand

- Two warm-white fairy lights (battery-operated)

- 2 kg fresh rose petals (red or customizable color options)

Read more

Create a simple yet deeply romantic gesture with our Personalized Message Easel Setup, designed to express your feelings in the most elegant way. This setup features a beautifully displayed custom message placed on a sturdy wooden easel, making it the focal point of your special moment. Surrounded by the soft glow of warm white fairy lights, the ambience becomes instantly cozy and intimate.

Fresh rose petals are thoughtfully arranged around the setup, adding a touch of romance and charm to the overall presentation. Whether it’s a proposal, anniversary, or heartfelt surprise, this setup delivers a perfect blend of simplicity and emotion, creating a memorable and visually appealing experience.

Read more

- iCustom message content must be shared in advance
- iEasel is made of foldable, sturdy wood for stable display
- iFairy lights are battery-operated and provide a warm white glow
- iRose petals are fresh; red is standard, other colors available on request
- iSetup can be arranged in indoor or outdoor locations
- iPrior booking is required for customization and preparation
- iAdditional décor elements or upgrades can be arranged at an extra cost
- iIdeal for proposals, anniversaries, and romantic surprises

# Handmade Scrapbook

📍 At Your Place

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Personalized handmade scrapbook with 25–30 pages
- Space for photos and custom messages
- A4 size (custom sizes available on request)
- Fully customizable theme and color palette
- Made with premium craft materials for durability and elegance
- Gift-ready packaging for a polished presentation

Read more

Give the gift of memories with this stunning Personalized Handmade Scrapbook—a heartfelt collection of moments, emotions, and creativity stitched together into a keepsake that lasts forever.

This scrapbook includes 25–30 artistically designed pages, each customized with your photos and personal messages. From romantic moments and travel adventures to family milestones and friendship memories, every page is created to reflect your story uniquely. Our skilled artists handcraft each layout with colorful paper, tags, embellishments, stickers, and creative layering, making it as visually appealing as it is meaningful.

Perfect for occasions like birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, farewells, or even a proposal, this scrapbook is a powerful way to revisit the joy of shared moments. Each page holds not just pictures, but the emotions behind them—turned into art.

You simply send us your selected images and notes, and we handle the rest—from layout planning to final assembly. The scrapbook is bound in a sturdy hard cover with thematic decoration and delivered safely in a gift-ready box.

Let this handmade creation become a treasured timeline of your beautiful journey together.

Read more

- iCustomers need to provide photos and messages for inclusion.
- iTheme, colors, and layout can be customized to your preference.
- iScrapbook is handcrafted, so slight variations may occur, adding to its uniqueness.
- iPreparation time is required for designing and assembling the scrapbook.
- iHigh-quality materials ensure durability and a premium look.
- iIdeal for gifting or preserving personal memories.

# Big Teddy Bear

📍 At Your Place

Rated **5.00** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- 5 feet (60 inches) giant teddy bear
- Made with ultra-soft, premium plush fabric
- Exclusive gift-ready packaging

Read more

Surprise your loved one with the ultimate gesture of affection—a Big Teddy Bear that stands an impressive 5 feet tall. This adorable plush companion is perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, Valentine’s Day, or any special occasion that calls for a warm hug.

Made from high-quality, ultra-soft fabric, this teddy bear is designed to be cuddly and comforting. Its friendly face, soft fur, and fluffy texture make it an irresistible gift for kids, partners, or even yourself. Whether placed on a bed, a couch, or a cozy corner, this giant teddy bear is sure to become the most loved and hugged companion in any room.

The Big Teddy Bear is carefully packaged in exclusive packaging, making it a perfect gift right out of the box. No need to worry about wrapping—it's delivered ready to surprise. The bear's plush fabric is easy to maintain, ensuring that it stays soft and huggable for a long time.

For added convenience, this adorable teddy bear comes with free shipping, so you can send it directly to your loved one without any extra cost. It’s an ideal way to make someone’s day special, even from a distance.

Whether it’s a romantic gesture, a comforting companion, or a cute addition to any room, the Big Teddy Bear is a gift that speaks the language of love, comfort, and joy.

Read more

- iThe teddy bear stands approximately 5 feet tall, making it a statement gift.
- iMade from high-quality plush fabric for a soft and huggable feel.
- iEasy to clean and maintain with basic care.
- iDelivered in premium packaging, ready for gifting.
- iSuitable for both romantic and general gifting occasions.
- iSlight variations in color or finishing may occur due to lighting and production.
- iDelivery timelines may vary depending on location and availability

# Terms & Conditions

#### Overview

This website is operated by Just4you Surprise Planners LLP. Throughout the site, the terms “we”, “us” and “our” refer to Just4you. Just4You offers this website, including all information, tools and services available from this site to you, the user, conditioned upon your acceptance of all terms, conditions, policies and notices stated here.By visiting our site and/ or purchasing something from us, you engage in our “Service” and agree to be bound by the following terms and conditions (“Terms of Service”, “Terms”), including those additional terms and conditions and policies referenced herein and/or available by hyperlink. These Terms of Service apply to all users of the site, including without limitation users who are browsers, vendors, customers, merchants, and/ or contributors of content.Please read these Terms of Service carefully before accessing or using our website. By accessing or using any part of the site, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to all the terms and conditions of this agreement, then you may not access the website or use any services. If these Terms of Service are considered an offer, acceptance is expressly limited to these Terms of Service.Any new features or tools which are added to the current store shall also be subject to the Terms of Service. You can review the most current version of the Terms of Service at any time on this page. We reserve the right to update, change or replace any part of these Terms of Service by posting updates and/or changes to our website. It is your responsibility to check this page periodically for changes. Your continued use of or access to the website following the posting of any changes constitutes acceptance of those changes.

_**The customer is requested to make the booking at least 48 hours prior to the event/delivery date. In case of urgent orders please get in touch with us at 8448441055 and we can check the availability for you. Please note that there might be surge charges applicable on urgent orders.**_

#### SECTION 1 – ONLINE STORE TERMS

**_“Surprise aren’t about decor. They’re about timing, secrecy, emotions and execution.”_**

## Who We Are

Life’s best moments are often unplanned—and that’s exactly how **Jusst4You** was born. What began as a late-night idea among three friends planning a meaningful birthday surprise has grown into a passion-led brand dedicated to turning simple moments into unforgettable celebrations.

**Born from Emotion, Not a Boardroom**

Jusst4You started with a heartfelt desire to make celebrations more personal, creative, and memorable—rooted in real friendships and genuine emotions.

**From One Room to Thousands of Smiles**

What began with a single surprise setup has evolved into curating magical experiences and romantic moments for people across multiple cities.

**More Than Décor — We Create Memories**

Today, Jusst4You is a team of surprise planners and emotion designers, crafting celebrations that tell stories and leave lasting impressions.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/admin-ajax-2.png)

## Our Vision

People around the globe will have a unique experiential memories / stories to relish/ talk about for generations.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/admin-ajax-3.png)

## Our Mission

J4U conceptualises & enables unique experiences & aims to become the No. 1 (in terms of revenue & ratings) unique experiences destination that caters individuals and corporates globally in the next 3 years

![Himan Kulshrestha](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2024/01/Himan-Kulshrestha-595x595.jpg)**Himan Kulshrestha**

(Co-Founder)

Meet the Founder

_“Built on emotion, trust, and attention to detail.”_

Hi, I’m Himan , and Jusst4You started with a simple idea— **to help people make their loved ones feel truly special.** Over time, I noticed that friends and family often wanted to express love and celebrate moments in a meaningful way, but didn’t always know how. Emotions are easy, but turning them into thoughtful, tangible experiences can feel overwhelming—and that’s exactly the challenge I wanted to solve.

At Jusst4You, we take your ideas, emotions, and dreams, and craft them into beautiful, memorable celebrations. From surprise room décor to customized experiences, every plan is carefully designed so your loved one feels cherished—and you get to enjoy the moment too, without stress or overspending.

This is not just a service—it’s a labor of love. Every celebration we create tells a story, and every smile we witness makes all the effort worthwhile.

So keep dreaming, keep celebrating, and if you’re looking for something **truly unique and personalized**, you know where to find us.

Keep exploring, keep thinking and if you want something customised further- you know where to reach us!

Creating Memories That Last a Lifetime

Every special moment deserves to be remembered forever. At **Jusst4You**, we transform your ideas into magical experiences—from romantic room décor and surprise proposals to intimate celebrations crafted with care and creativity. Every detail is personalized to make your loved ones feel truly cherished. Whether it’s a birthday, anniversary, or a spontaneous surprise, we handle everything so you can simply enjoy the joy of the moment. With Jusst4You, ordinary days turn into extraordinary memories that last a lifetime.

[Explore Our Experiences](https://jusst4you.com/shop)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2025/05/Decoration-Banner-mobile-2.webp)

## What We Do

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-8.webp)

### Proposal & Engagement Setups

Make your proposal a story to remember. We design intimate or grand proposals with customized décor, lighting, and creative setups, ensuring your special moment is magical and unforgettable.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-1.webp)

### Room & Hotel Décor

Transform ordinary spaces into extraordinary experiences. From romantic setups to themed celebrations, we decorate rooms with flowers, lights, balloons, and personalized touches, creating memories that last a lifetime.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-2.webp)

### Birthday Celebrations

Celebrate milestones big or small! We handle birthdays for kids, 1st birthdays, 18th, 21st, 50th, and even 100th celebrations, with custom décor, themes, and surprises that reflect the personality of the birthday person.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-3.webp)

### Anniversary & Marriage Celebrations

From 1st to all anniversaries, and all milestone weddings, we curate experiences that reignite love and celebrate togetherness. Personalized themes, romantic touches, and heartfelt surprises make each celebration truly special.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-4.webp)

### Candlelight Dinners

Set the perfect ambiance for romance. We create private, elegant, and intimate candlelight dinner setups, complete with décor, lighting, and personalized elements for a memorable evening.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-5.webp)

### Surprises

Birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, or just because—we design custom surprises that wow your loved ones. Every detail is thoughtfully planned to create joy, excitement, and unforgettable memories.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-7.webp)

### Bachelorette Parties

Celebrate your last fling before the ring with style! We plan fun, memorable, and personalized bachelor and bachelorette parties, including décor, themes, and unique experiences.

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/about-us-icon-6.webp)

### Gifts & Personalized Keepsakes

From bouquets, hampers, and personalized gifts to unique surprises, we help you express your feelings through thoughtful, one-of-a-kind gestures. Every gift is carefully curated to make your loved one feel truly special.

## Why to choose us

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/himn.png)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/100Personalized-Touch-icon.webp)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/6000Successful-Marriage-Proposals-icon.webp)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/15000Happy-Customers-Globally-icon.webp)

![](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/10-Years-of-Experience-icon.webp)

## Our Presence

![How It Works​](https://jusst4you.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/01/How-It-Works%E2%80%8B.webp)

## Real Moments

## Our Promise​​

### Emotion First

We design every experience around your emotions, ensuring each celebration feels personal and meaningful.

### Personalized Experiences

No copy-paste setups. Every décor, surprise, and celebration is customized to match your story.

### On-Time & Hassle-Free

From planning to execution, we manage everything smoothly so you can enjoy the moment stress-free.

### Quality You Can Trust

Premium décor elements, trusted partners, and attention to detail in every setup we deliver.

### Honest & Transparent Pricing

No hidden charges—only clear pricing that offers true value without stretching your budget.

### Memories That Last

We don’t just plan events—we create moments you’ll cherish forever.

[Call Now](tel:+918448441055)

# Cancellation Policy

#### KINDLY READ ALL THE POINTS MENTIONED IN CANCELLATION POLICY CAREFULLY.

No cancellation, adjustments, Re-scheduling or refund shall be made in case of customized gifts once the booking is made.

– If cancellations are made 10 days prior to the required date of booking, an amount of 15% of the total package cost will be charged as cancellation fees.

– If cancellations are made 10-6 days prior to the required date of booking, an amount of 25% of the total package cost will be charged as cancellation fees.

– If cancellations are made 6-2 days prior to the required date of booking, an amount of 50% of the total package cost will be charged as cancellation fees.

– If cancellations are made 2 days or the same day prior to the required date of booking, an amount of 100% of the total package cost will be charged as cancellation fees.

– Due to any unexpected or unavoidable circumstances like weather conditions such as Rain, Flood, Thunderstorm, Sandstorm or any legal/political unfavorable conditions which may cause like rallies, government function bookings or riots which may cause any trouble arranging the setup, firm shall not be responsible and held accountable for the same. No refunds of any amount will be made on the occurrence of any of the circumstance mentioned above.

Rescheduling will be considered on the available dates after the applicable charges discussed by the sales team.

#### Refund Time

**Q: Once requested, within how many days shall Just4You refund the transaction?**

A: From the day of receiving cancellation request, the refund amount decided will be returned between 7-8 working days.

**Q: Within how many days will the refund be reflected in your bank account?**

A: The amount shall be reflected within 7-10 working days in the original mode used for payment. In case of any problems related to refund, you can send an email to surprises@jusst4you.com.

**Q: What if someone has not read the cancellation policy before the booking?**

A: The cancellation policy will be shared with the client before the agreed amount is paid, it is a must to read cancellation policy to keep the process transparent.

**Q: What will be the Refund Policy in case of cancellation by Just4You Surprise Planners?**

A: In case the experience has to be cancelled by Just4You owing to unforeseen circumstances, full refund will be offered to the client and will be credited within next 8-10 working days.

– To Officially cancel the booking, Message – CANCEL<space><Booking reference ID> at 8459122919 from your registered number or registered email at surprises@jusst4you.com and we will process your request.

– Refund shall be processed within 7-8 working days after cancellation.

#### Reschedule Policy

– More than 48 hours before experience: Rescheduling at 15% Fee

– 24 hours to 48 hours before experience: Rescheduling case to case basis 30% fee

– Less than 24 hours before experience, no Rescheduling will be done.

– No Cancellation is possible for experiences booked for 30th December till 1st Jan and 13th to 15th February. No amount of refund will be initiated in such cases.

– No Re-Schedule possible for experiences booked for 2 days prior to the date of it’s execution.

**NOTE**: This is standard cancellation policy. Kindly check individual product

cancellation policies before booking as there are possibilities of slight difference.

Not reading of the cancellation policy may result in misunderstanding between client and the firm. Firm urges the client to read all the cancellation and rescheduling related points carefully.

Mini Balloons Decor

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Mini Balloons Decor

📍 At Your Place

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- 100–120 balloons for ceiling decoration (air-filled with ribbons)

- 100 additional balloons for floor or wall décor

- Balloon installation using masking tape

- Complete setup at your location

Read more

Bring an explosion of color and joy to your event with our Mini Balloons Decor. This lively and affordable decor setup includes 100-120 normal air balloons hung from the ceiling, each with a ribbon that gracefully flows down, creating a playful and festive vibe. Alongside, 100 additional air balloons will be strategically placed on the floor or walls, adding more dimension and excitement to your venue.

The simplicity and vibrancy of this setup make it perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, or any occasion that needs a touch of brightness. The balloons are secured with masking tape, ensuring that they stay in place throughout the event. Whether you’re planning an indoor party or a casual get-together, this decor adds a fun atmosphere that your guests will love.

Read more

- iSetup time is approximately 1–2 hours, depending on venue size
- iBalloons are air-filled (not helium)
- iMasking tape is used and is generally safe for walls (surface dependent)
- iSuitable for indoor decorations
- iBalloon colors can be customized upon request
- iIdeal for birthdays, anniversaries, house parties, and celebrations

Read more

# 52 Types of Kisses

📍 At Your Place

Rated **4.00** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- 52 Types of Kisses Cards Set
- 52 uniquely designed cards
- Elegant, printed with a description of each type of kiss
- Compact mini box for easy storage and gifting

Read more

Kissing is a beautiful expression of love and affection, a universal language that can convey a thousand emotions without saying a word. The 52 Types of Kisses Cards is a delightful collection that celebrates this timeless gesture of intimacy. Whether you’re looking to add some excitement to your relationship or simply want to explore the different ways you can express your love, this set has something for everyone.

Each of the 52 cards features a unique type of kiss, from the classic "Forehead Kiss", which shows care and protection, to the passionate "French Kiss", and even the playful "Eskimo Kiss", where you rub noses. With a wide variety of kisses included, you’ll never run out of ways to show your affection.

The cards are beautifully printed with elegant designs and carefully chosen words that describe the meaning and significance of each type of kiss. Perfect for couples who want to keep the romance alive, these cards can be used as a fun game, a daily romantic challenge, or simply as a sweet reminder of the many ways you can show your love.

Encased in a compact mini box, the 52 Types of Kisses Cards is not only a charming keepsake but also a convenient, portable set that you can take anywhere. Whether you’re planning a romantic date night, celebrating an anniversary, or just looking for a way to reconnect, this set is the perfect companion.

Give it as a gift to your partner, a newlywed couple, or even to yourself. It’s a thoughtful, fun, and meaningful way to celebrate the magic of kissing and the special bond you share with your loved one.

Read more

- iThis is a romantic gifting product, not an experience setup.
- iIdeal for couples, anniversaries, weddings, date nights, or surprise gifts.
- iCards are designed for fun, emotional connection, and playful romantic moments.
- iEasy to carry while travelling or planning surprise dates.
- iCustom gift packaging can be arranged at an additional cost.

A budget candlelight dinner for couples can be just as magical as a luxury setup if crafted thoughtfully. At Just4You Surprise Planners, we believe that every couple deserves to celebrate love in a special way, regardless of budget. That’s why we design affordable candlelight dinner packages in Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore, Jaipur, Goa, and other major cities that bring together elegance, intimacy, and affordability.

Guitarist at Doorstep

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Guitarist at Doorstep

📍 At Your Place

Rated **5.00** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Live guitarist performance at your chosen location
- 12–15 minutes of live musical performance
- Trending and occasion-based song selection
- Professional musician with guitar
- Surprise entry and performance for the special moment

Read more

Make your special moments unforgettable with our "Guitarist at Doorstep" package – a perfect surprise for birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, or any celebration. This unique experience brings the magic of live music right to your doorstep, creating a memorable and heartwarming ambiance.

Our talented guitarist arrives at your desired location, whether it’s your home, office, garden, or any other place you choose. With a 12-15 minute live performance, the musician plays a selection of trending songs perfectly suited to the occasion. Whether you want to express love, celebrate a milestone, or simply bring joy to someone’s day, this musical surprise is sure to leave a lasting impression.

The guitarist is skilled in a wide range of music genres, allowing them to perform romantic melodies, upbeat hits, soulful classics, or even your favorite songs on request. The sound of the guitar, combined with the warmth of a personal performance, creates an intimate and unforgettable experience for you and your loved one.

Booking our "Guitarist at Doorstep" package is quick and hassle-free. Simply choose your preferred date, time, and location, and we take care of the rest. Our musician ensures a smooth and delightful performance, making it a perfect surprise for any celebration.

Whether you want to serenade your partner, surprise your parents, or brighten a friend’s day, our "Guitarist at Doorstep" package is a magical way to express your emotions and create memories that will last a lifetime.

Read more

- iThe performance duration will be approximately 12–15 minutes.
- iThe musician will perform popular and occasion-based songs suitable for the celebration.
- iThe location should allow easy access and enough space for the performer.
- iThis experience is ideal for birthdays, anniversaries, proposals, or romantic surprises.
- iAdvance booking is required to schedule the musician.
- iTravel charges may apply depending on the location.

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Unique 8-fold long-format personalized card design
- Space for 15 high-quality printed photographs
- 20 personalized messages (handwritten or printed as per preference)
- Decorative glitter highlights for an elegant finish
- Premium fancy pattern papers for a vibrant look
- Customizable doodle props based on theme
- Additional decorative elements such as ribbons, stickers, and gemstones
- Made using high-quality craft paper and decorative materials
- Fully customizable theme (Birthday, Anniversary, Friendship, Love, Farewell, etc.)

Read more

Unveil your emotions in a truly artistic way with the 8 Folds Long Colorful Card—a captivating piece of handmade art that goes beyond the ordinary. This elegantly designed card is a creative blend of colors, patterns, and personalized elements, making it an unforgettable gift for your loved ones.

Measuring an impressive length with eight creative folds, this card is a journey of memories and emotions waiting to be explored. Each fold is thoughtfully decorated with glitter highlights, adding a magical sparkle that makes the card visually stunning. The fancy pattern paper enhances its elegance, ensuring it stands out among any collection of cards.

The card holds 15 precious pictures, allowing you to capture and showcase your most cherished memories. These photos are thoughtfully arranged, making each page a heartfelt reminder of special moments shared together.

Adding to the personal touch are 20 personalized messages, neatly written or printed on the card. These messages can range from heartfelt notes, inside jokes, or meaningful quotes, making the card a truly unique keepsake. It is not just a card; it is a story told through words and images.

For an added touch of creativity, the card is adorned with doodle props, giving it a playful and artistic feel. These cute and colorful props can be customized to suit any theme—be it love, friendship, birthdays, or anniversaries.

The card is further embellished with decorative items, such as ribbons, stickers, gemstones, and more. These details give it a touch of luxury and make it a delightful keepsake that your loved ones will treasure.

This 8 Folds Long Colorful Card is versatile and perfect for any occasion—be it a birthday, anniversary, farewell, or just a surprise gift for someone special. It is a thoughtful way to express your emotions, combining creativity, sentiment, and elegance in a single gift.

Whether you are celebrating a milestone, expressing gratitude, or simply making someone smile, this card is the perfect way to do it. Its handmade touch adds a sense of warmth and effort, making your gesture even more meaningful.

Gift the 8 Folds Long Colorful Card to your loved ones and watch their faces light up with joy as they unfold the beautiful journey of memories you have created for them.

# Call Panda at Home

📍 At Your Place

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Panda mascot appearance at the event

- 15–25 minutes of engaging dance performance

- Fun interaction and panda hugs for guests

- Professional artist inside the mascot costume

- Entertaining performance suitable for all age groups

Read more

Call Panda offers a unique and fun experience for your events! Perfect for birthdays, corporate gatherings, or any special occasion, our Panda Mascot will bring energy and smiles to the party. Whether it's a kid's event or an adult celebration, this lovable mascot is sure to delight everyone.

What you can expect with Call Panda:

- 10-15 Minutes of Dance Moves: Watch as the professional Panda mascot busts some fun dance moves to liven up the event and get everyone into the groove!
- Panda Hugs: A truly heartwarming experience, our mascot will spread love and warmth with adorable panda hugs, making your guests feel extra special.
- Professional Artist: Our panda is not only cute, but also a trained professional artist, ensuring high-quality entertainment for all.

Additionally, you have the option to make the experience even more special by adding gifts to be handed out by the Panda mascot. These can be customized to suit your event's theme or guests.

This fun-filled, interactive experience is guaranteed to add a unique touch to your event and leave everyone with lasting memories of the day.

Read more

- iPerformance duration is approximately 15–25 minutes.
- iThe mascot artist will dance, interact with guests, and create fun photo moments.
- iSuitable for birthdays, surprises, kids’ parties, and celebrations.
- iAdequate space should be available for the mascot performance.
- iCustom gifts or special interactions can be arranged on request at an additional cost.
- iAdvance booking is recommended to ensure mascot availability.

# Acapella Choir

Rated **4.50** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Elevate your special moments with the rich harmonies of a live **Acapella Choir**. Whether it’s a romantic proposal, a surprise celebration, or an intimate gathering, our western-style choir will perform your favorite songs—no instruments, just pure voices creating magic. Let melodious vocals add a soulful charm to your unforgettable occasion.

Read more

Experience the captivating beauty of vocal harmony with our **Acapella Choir**—a unique, instrument-free musical performance that adds elegance and emotional depth to your special moments. Whether you're planning a surprise proposal, a birthday, an anniversary, or a luxury event, our professionally trained western choir creates an ambiance that stirs hearts and leaves lasting impressions.

Imagine the gentle layering of voices rising in perfect harmony as they perform your favorite love songs, pop hits, or soulful classics—all customized to your taste. With no need for instruments, the performance blends seamlessly into any setting, whether it's an outdoor garden, a hotel ballroom, or even a private terrace.

Our acapella choir consists of 4–6 vocalists, each with classical and contemporary training. They arrive professionally dressed and ready to perform a 15–20 minute set of 3–5 songs curated just for your occasion. The performance can be used as a romantic surprise, a heartfelt tribute, or an unexpected emotional highlight during an event.

Ideal for those who appreciate refined, subtle, and meaningful entertainment, this experience offers more than music—it delivers memory-making moments.

We also offer add-on options such as personalized song selections, coordinated dance or proposal reveals, and live video coverage to preserve the moment forever.

Let your favorite tunes come alive like never before, through voices that speak straight to the soul.

# Air Safari

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- 3–4 minutes of paramotoring flight per person
- Professional pilot-controlled and operated experience
- Safety briefing before the flight
- Safety gear (helmet and harness)
- Scenic aerial views

Read more

Embark on a once-in-a-lifetime adventure with Air Safari! This exhilarating experience offers you and your partner 3-4 minutes of Paramotoring, an exciting and unique way to explore the skies. With the guidance of a professional pilot, you'll soar above scenic views, feeling the thrill of flight and the wind beneath your wings.

Paramotoring is one of the safest and most exciting ways to enjoy the freedom of flight, as you glide smoothly with the wind, taking in breathtaking panoramic views of the surrounding landscapes. The pilot-controlled and operated experience ensures you can sit back and relax while being in safe hands, making this an ideal experience for couples looking for something adventurous and memorable.

Perfect for anniversaries, proposals, or just a special outing, Air Safari offers a rare opportunity to create lifelong memories with your loved one. Whether you're soaring above the city, lush landscapes, or along a serene coast, this thrilling adventure will leave you with a sense of awe and excitement.

Read more

- iSuitable for couples and adventure seekers
- iFlight duration is 3–4 minutes per person
- iOperated under professional supervision for safety
- iWeather conditions may affect scheduling
- iComfortable clothing and closed footwear recommended
- iAdvance booking is required

Create a heartwarming and unforgettable moment for your loved one with our "Airport Welcome" package – a grand and thoughtful way to make their arrival extra special. Whether it’s a long-awaited reunion, a surprise welcome for a family member, a romantic gesture for your partner, or a heartfelt greeting for a friend, this package is designed to make them feel truly loved and cherished from the moment they step out.

**A Grand and Personalized Welcome:**

- 10x3 Feet Personalized Banner: Welcome your loved one with a striking 10x3 feet banner, customized with a heartfelt message, their name, or any text of your choice. The banner is printed in vibrant colors, ensuring it stands out and captures their attention.
- Beautiful Red Roses: Present them with a bunch of 15 fresh and fragrant red roses – a timeless symbol of love, affection, and joy. The roses are elegantly wrapped, making it a beautiful and touching gift.
- Fun Polka Balloons: Add a touch of joy and celebration with 20 colorful polka balloons. The playful design of the balloons creates a festive atmosphere and makes the welcome even more memorable.

**Convenient and Flexible Timing:**

- Standard Execution Time: Our team will be at the airport between 10:00 AM and 8:00 PM to set up the welcome arrangement.
- Odd Timing Options: If you need the welcome outside the standard time frame, we can arrange it at an additional cost.
- On-Time Coordination: Our team will coordinate with you to ensure the perfect timing for the welcome, making sure that everything is ready before your loved one arrives.

**Perfect for Any Occasion:**

- Reunion with Family: Surprise your parents, siblings, or children with a heartfelt welcome after a long time apart.
- Romantic Gesture: Make your partner feel special and loved as they arrive.
- Celebrations: Welcome friends or guests arriving for weddings, birthdays, or special events.
- Corporate Greetings: Greet important clients, business partners, or team members with a warm and professional welcome.

Read more

- iThe banner size will be approximately 10 feet x 3 feet.
- iThe custom welcome message must be shared in advance for printing.
- iThis surprise is arranged at the airport arrival are
- iExact coordination timing is required based on the flight arrival schedule.
- iThe setup is designed to create a short but memorable welcome moment.
- iAvailability may vary depending on airport guidelines and permissions.

Alphabet Album

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Alphabet Album

📍 At Your Place

Rated **4.50** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Handmade scrapbook designed in a unique alphabet theme
- Glittery alphabets for an attractive and vibrant look
- Creative doodle cut-out props for artistic detailing
- Space for 8 photographs in different sizes
- 5–6 personalized quotes or messages
- Premium fancy pattern paper for each page
- Fully customized photo placement and message arrangement
- Compact and easy-to-carry design (size customizable upon request)

Read more

Capture your cherished memories in a fun and creative way with the Alphabet Album, a beautifully designed scrapbook that combines the magic of glittery alphabets with your precious moments. This album is not just a collection of photos; it is a delightful journey through memories, enhanced with cute cut-out doodle props and heartfelt messages.

The Alphabet Album features a vibrant and artistic design, starting with glittery alphabets that can be customized to spell a name, a special word, or a memorable phrase. These glittery letters add a touch of sparkle and elegance, making the album visually stunning.

Inside the album, you will find 8 carefully placed pictures of different sizes, allowing you to showcase a variety of moments. Whether it’s your favorite selfies, family portraits, or fun candid shots, each picture is beautifully displayed on fancy pattern paper, giving the album a colorful and creative look.

To make your memories even more special, the album includes 5-6 short quotes or messages. These can be personalized to express your feelings, capture the essence of the moments, or simply add a touch of humor. The text is written in stylish fonts, perfectly matching the theme of the album.

But that’s not all—the Alphabet Album also comes with adorable cut-out doodle props. These quirky props add a playful touch to your memories, creating a scrapbook that is full of life and personality. From tiny stars and hearts to cute cartoon characters, the doodle props bring a sense of joy to every page.

The entire album is crafted using high-quality fancy pattern paper, ensuring a durable and beautiful finish. Whether you are gifting it to someone special or keeping it for yourself, the Alphabet Album is a creative and heartwarming way to preserve memories.

Perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, Valentine’s Day, or just because, this album is a unique and personalized gift that your loved ones will cherish forever.

Read more

- iCustomers need to provide 8 photos and 5–6 personalized messages/quotes.
- iPhoto sizes and placement are customized for a creative presentation.
- iTheme revolves around glittery alphabets with doodle elements, with slight variations possible due to handcrafted nature.
- iThe scrapbook is handmade, so each piece is unique.
- iSize can be adjusted based on preference (additional cost may apply).
- iEnsure images shared are of good quality for best printing results.
- iPreparation time is required for designing and assembling the scrapbook.
- iHandle with care to maintain decorative elements and overall finish.

metadata.title: Terrace Decorations Archives | Just 4 You Surprise Planners
metadata.og:description: Transform Your Terrace with Amazing Decoration Ideas Our decoration brings you the best of style and elegance to your outdoor space, making every occasion memorable. Whether it is about planning a birthday bash, an anniversary celebration, or hosting an intimate rooftop gathering, our terrace design ideas are sure to make your event shine. Terrace Party Design Ideas for Every Celebration We understand that each celebration differs. This is the reason our terrace party decoration ideas are so versatile and suited to different themes and moods Birthday Party on the Terrace: add a personal touch with the terrace birthday decoration by putting up colorful balloons, fairy lights, and a lively setting which guests would simply love. Anniversary Decorations for Rooftop or Terrace: For a romantic anniversary at the rooftop or terrace, we have the most beautiful flower arrangements, cozy seating, and mood lighting that make the environment intimate. Party Design for Balcony & Rooftop: Even smaller spaces can turn out to be festive. Our small terrace and balcony decoration ideas make any place beautiful with all the tiny details and cozy setups. Why Use Our Terrace & Rooftop Decorations? Our rooftop and terrace decoration is perfect for any occasion, from the largest of terraces to small balconies, with customized arrangements that will make your celebration unforgettable. With dreamy lighting and stylish table decorations, the class brought into your outdoor space with rooftop terrace party decorations cannot be compared. From rooftop terrace party design ideas to small terrace decoration ideas for intimate gatherings, we cater to all types of preferences. Focusing on personalization, a keen eye for design is transformed into a beautiful venue that will make any terrace turn into an elegant celebration space. Transform Your Terrace into an Elegant Celebration Space Terraces are ideal sites to host memorable events, held outside under the vast open sky. We could convert any given terrace to be a fashionable venue holding your special moments using the terrace decor services we deliver. Whether it is holding an intimate dinner or just getting together in a really big way, we develop ideas for decorating a party at a terrace, emphasizing the outdoor space and carrying through the atmosphere of every celebration. Unique Ideas to Decorate Your Terrace Party Whether it’s a birthday, an anniversary, or a casual get-together, our terrace party decoration ideas bring creativity and elegance to every setup. Here is how we help you in designing a terrace event: Birthday on a Terrance: Birthdays are full of colors and joy! Our terrace birthday decoration ideas range from colorful balloons to personalized banners and table settings, adding ambient string lights and a themed cake table on your special day that would make it feel exclusive but lively. Decorate the Terrace for Anniversary: Do you want the anniversary to become a romantic affair? Here, our anniversary decoration ideas at the terrace combine soft lighting, floral arrangements, and cozy seating, transforming your terrace into an intimate haven that is perfect for the celebration of love. Rooftop Party Decor Ideas: Party in your rooftop is equally all about making the style and fun quotient. Our rooftop party decor ideas and arrangements will infuse sophistication and bring that magic to your alfresco event through chic aspects such as contemporary furniture, hanging lights, and lavish greenery. Rooftop Terrace Party Design Ideas: For the modern touch, our rooftop terrace party design ideas are sleek table arrangements, minimalistic backdrops, and themed centerpieces. It is a combination of decor and design elements that make the space elevated and classy for the celebration. Elevate Every Celebration with Terrace & Rooftop Decorations We believe that every celebration deserves its special touch. We curate our rooftop terrace party decorations to best match the theme of the event. So, we make each setup unique: whether a birthday party that’s very lively, a romantic dinner, or an elegant cocktail evening, we design with the intention of making your terrace stand out. Our decoration for terraces is stylish and functional. Our incorporation of quality material with the innovative designs ensures that any setup makes the most use of the space of your terraces with maintaining beauty. Through our terrace decor ideas, your creative style will stand out in the events that you will host at your venue. Why Choose Us for Your Terrace Decor Needs? Our team creates fantastic terrace decorations customized to every event, while our beautiful decoration ideas for parties and personal celebrations guarantee a perfect and unforgettable experience for the guests. Be it a birthday or a festive gathering, our designs transform your terrace into a beautiful and inviting event space. Bring Your Dream Terrace Party to Life Our services are designed to fit all kinds of celebrations, ranging from terrace party decoration ideas to rooftop terrace party design ideas. We work diligently to create terrace decor with our keen eye for detail and passion for creativity in order to make every event special.

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Experience an intimate evening with a **luxurious poolside dinner at The LaLiT**. Delight in a lavish **4-course North Indian meal**, complete with **welcome drinks**, a **cake and bouquet** on the table, and the elegance of a **private butler service**. This 2-hour escape promises a perfect blend of romance, fine dining, and serene ambiance—ideal for celebrations or just a special evening with your partner.

Read more

Indulge in an elegant and romantic escape with the **Poolside Candlelight Dinner at The LaLiT**—a beautifully curated dining experience crafted to make your evening unforgettable. Set against the serene backdrop of a luxurious poolside ambiance, this date is a perfect blend of sophistication and heartfelt romance.

Upon arrival, you're greeted with **welcome drinks** to set the tone. A beautifully decorated **table awaits**, complete with a **bouquet of fresh flowers** and a **delicious cake**, making the setting perfect for birthdays, anniversaries, or even a surprise proposal.

Enjoy a specially curated **4-course North Indian meal**, featuring a variety of rich, flavorful dishes (both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options available), designed to please the most refined palates. From appetizers to desserts, each dish is served with care by your **dedicated private butler**, ensuring personalized attention throughout the experience.

This experience is not just about food—it's about creating a memory. The tranquil sound of water, the soft lighting, and the exclusivity of your private space combine to create a magical setting that will linger in your hearts for a long time.

Whether you’re celebrating a milestone or just looking to spend quality time together, this **2-hour luxury poolside date** is an experience worth cherishing.

# Candlelight Date with Stay in Andheri

📍 Andheri East

Rated **4.50** out of 5

6 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Private dining setup with romantic décor

- Candlelight and rose petal decoration

- Balloon décor for enhanced ambience

- 3-course meal for the couple

- Personal butler service

- Private movie screening experience

- Cozy seating arrangement for viewing

Read more

Create magical memories with our luxury private room experience — the perfect setting for anniversaries, proposals, date nights, or special celebrations. Walk into an elegantly decorated private space adorned with soft candlelight, romantic rose petals, and vibrant balloon decor. A dedicated private butler is at your service, ensuring every detail is taken care of, allowing you to simply enjoy the moment.Indulge in a curated 3-course gourmet meal that includes two starters, two main course options, and two decadent desserts — all freshly prepared to suit your preferences. Whether you choose lunch or dinner, your meal is complemented by a personalized ambiance that turns any ordinary day into a fairytale.The experience doesn’t end with dinner — relax with your partner during an intimate private movie screening, just for the two of you. Choose from a wide selection of films or bring your own favorite. This is more than just a meal; it's a complete romantic journey.

Read more

- iThis experience is designed for 2 guests (couple).
- iPrior reservation is required to ensure availability.
- iThe meal includes a 3-course dining experience.
- iMovie selection can be shared in advance (subject to availability).
- iSetup duration is typically 2–3 hours prior to the experience.
- iThe experience duration may vary depending on the movie length.
- iIdeal for date nights, anniversaries, proposals, or special celebrations.
- iAdditional décor or upgrades can be arranged at an extra cost.

Rated **4.50** out of 5

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Indulge in a magical, private dinner experience inside a royally adorned **Baradari**, where romance blooms under red and white balloons, flickering tea lights, and fragrant flowers. With romantic music, a chef-curated seven-course menu, and a surprise dessert, this is your perfect moment to create memories, sing, dance, and fall in love all over again.

Read more

Step into your own private world of romance with our exclusive **Baradari Sit-down Dinner** experience, meticulously curated for couples seeking a luxurious, love-filled evening. Each Baradari is individually decorated to offer a bespoke setting — featuring a vibrant red and white balloon theme, flickering tea lights, elegant roses, marigolds, dahlias, and aromatic candles. Plush glittery cushions add an extra touch of opulence to your seating.At the heart of the Baradari lies a beautifully arranged dinner table adorned with candles and fresh flowers — a visual feast even before the culinary journey begins. Accompanied by soothing romantic background music, you’ll enjoy an intimate ambiance that invites heartfelt conversations, spontaneous dancing, and perhaps a love song or two.The culinary experience is nothing short of exceptional, offering a **Seven-Course Gourmet Menu** served in style. From appetizing starters to delectable mains, each course is crafted with flair and flavor — culminating in a **Chef’s Special Surprise Dessert** that melts in your mouth and leaves a lasting impression.Whether you're celebrating an anniversary, a proposal, or simply each other, this unforgettable evening inside a Baradari promises love, laughter, and lifelong memories.

# Flash Mob

📍 At Your Place

Rated **4.50** out of 5

2 Reviews


InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- 5 talented dancers performing a synchronized flash mob routine

- Red roses held by each dancer for a romantic touch

- High-energy performance lasting 4–7 minutes

- Portable Bluetooth speaker for music and sound during the performance

Read more

Add excitement and energy to your event with a Flash Mob! This package features 5 professional dancers who will perform an exhilarating 2-minute routine to surprise and entertain your guests. Each dancer will carry a red rose, adding a touch of elegance and symbolism to the performance.

The performance is designed to be dynamic and engaging, capturing the attention of everyone at your event. Whether it’s a wedding, anniversary, birthday, or corporate event, this Flash Mob will bring a fun, unexpected twist that will leave everyone talking.

The dance is accompanied by high-quality music played through a portable Bluetooth speaker, ensuring the sound and rhythm are just as lively as the performance itself.

Why You'll Love It:

- 5 Talented Dancers: A synchronized performance that adds excitement to your celebration.
- Red Roses: Each dancer will hold a red rose, adding a romantic touch to the performance.
- Up to 2-Minute Performance: A quick and high-energy routine that won’t disrupt your event schedule.
- Portable Bluetooth Speaker: Ensures great sound quality for the performance, wherever your event is hosted.

Read more

- iThe flash mob performance lasts approximately 4–7 minutes.
- iA team of 6 professional dancers will perform the routine.
- iThe dancers will enter as a surprise and start the performance at the planned moment.
- iEach dancer will carry a red rose, adding a romantic element to the act.
- iA portable Bluetooth speaker will be used to play the performance music.
- iSuitable for proposals, birthdays, anniversaries, or surprise celebrations.
- iAdvance coordination is required to plan the timing and location of the performance.

# Personalised Magazine

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

Create a **Personalized Magazine** that celebrates special moments, memories, and messages. Featuring **25 to 30 pictures** and **10 to 15 personalized messages** (ranging from 20 to 100 words), this **12-sided magazine** is the perfect keepsake for any occasion. From birthdays to anniversaries or milestones, let your loved ones enjoy a custom magazine with their own story.

Read more

Imagine receiving a **magazine** filled with memories, emotions, and heartfelt messages—a personalized publication that reflects moments that matter most. Our **Personalized Magazine** package brings your memories to life, capturing your personal story in a beautiful, printed format.

Here’s what you get in this unique gift:

📸 **25 to 30 Pictures:** Choose your favorite photographs to showcase in the magazine. From childhood moments to recent memories, we’ll ensure the magazine is filled with the images that matter most.

💌 **10 to 15 Personalized Messages:** Whether you want to include heartfelt notes, quotes, or special messages (ranging from **20 to 100 words**), we’ll work with you to customize each one. These can be from friends, family, or from you to the recipient.

📰 **12-Sided Magazine:** The magazine features **12 sides of personalized content**, allowing ample space for photos, stories, and messages. It’s designed to feel like a genuine magazine, with a stylish layout and professional quality print.

🎁 **Custom Cover Design:** The magazine cover will be designed to match the theme and personal preferences you choose. Add your name, special occasion, and a message that sets the tone for the pages inside.

📦 **Delivery:** The **12-sided magazine** will be delivered to you or your loved one as a perfect keepsake or gift.

Read more

Read more

Read more

Midnight Surprise

🏆#1 Decoration Website in India

# Midnight Surprise

📍 At Your Place

InclusionsDescriptionNeed to Know

- Live guitarist and vocalist performance at the doorstep

- ½ kg celebration cake

- Bunch of 15 fresh red roses

- 2 confetti explosives for the surprise moment

- Personalized greeting card with custom message

- Bunch of helium balloons

- Midnight doorstep surprise delivery around 11:59 PM

Read more

Surprise your special someone in the most magical way with our Midnight Surprise. A perfect blend of romance, music, and heartfelt gestures, this experience will leave your loved one speechless.

🎶 Live Music Performance:

- A talented Guitarist and Vocalist will arrive at your location and perform your choice of romantic songs, setting the mood for an unforgettable night.
- You can even request your favorite song for a personal touch.

🎂 Sweet Treat:

- A delicious 1/2 kg cake of your choice (chocolate, black forest, or red velvet), perfect for a midnight celebration.

🌹 Lovely Flowers:

- A charming 15 red roses bunch, symbolizing your deep love and affection.

🎊 Celebration Moments:

- Two confetti explosives to create a magical, celebratory moment when the clock strikes midnight.

💌 Heartfelt Message:

- A personalized card with your heartfelt message, making your feelings known in the most beautiful way.

🎈 Floating Surprise:

- A bunch of helium balloons, creating a magical, floating decor that adds to the surprise.

⏰ Perfect Timing:

- The entire setup, including the live music, flowers, cake, and balloons, will be delivered at 11:59 pm, making it a perfect midnight surprise.

Read more

- iThe surprise is scheduled around 11:59 PM for the midnight celebration moment.
- iThe cake flavor can be selected while booking, subject to availability.
- iThe personalized message for the greeting card must be shared in advance.
- iThe location should allow easy access for the performers and delivery team.
- iConfetti explosives are safe party poppers used for celebration.
- iAdvance booking is recommended to ensure availability.

### Cancellation Policy

- ⏰  10 days or more before the experience: Cancellation with 85% Refund
- 🗓️  6–9 days before the experience: Cancellation with 75% Refund
- 🔄  2–5 days before the experience: Cancellation with 50% Refund
- ⛔  Within 48 hours or on the experience day: Cancellation with No Refund
- 🎉  Peak dates (30th Dec–1st Jan & 13th–15th Feb)or any other festival date: No Cancellation or Refund
